programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 7: Decisions
Journey To A New Earth - Episode 8: Let’s Change This
Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski & Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: Without a Pedal
programme.desc: Snowboarding Alaska the hard way. An epic winter bike trip down Canada’s Cassiar Highway turns into a test of survival, obsession, and how far you’ll go for the dream.

programme.title: Northbound and Around
programme.desc: Hungry for clips and greedy for turns, Johan Rosen, Garrett “Worm” Warnick and friends spent the season leaving no line unridden and no pillow unsmashed. Driven by the most unsatisfiable of desires, finding good snow, the crew spent the season running from warm temperatures and chasing down a dream. To get to the promised land, they found themselves traveling… Northbound and Around. Featuring: Garrett Warnick, Johan Rosen, Nils Arvidsson, Ryan Paterson, Keenan Filmer, Kareem El Rafie Nils Mindnich, Jess Kimura, Bode Merrill, Ben Bilocq, Brandon Davis, Nick Khattar, Kyle Mack Edited by: Johan Rosen

programme.title: CHANNEL ZeRO
programme.desc: Released in 2020, this Absinthe Films feature highlights the unifying power of snowboarding during a divisive moment in history, celebrating a global community that refuses to be separated by physical or mental barriers.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 01
programme.desc: Jamie Lynn is an introvert. In his snowboarding and art-making, however, he’s big and expressive. Watch Episode 1 of his legendary Microdose series. Featuring Circe Wallace, Mike Hatchett, Sean Sullivan, Temple Cummins, Jason Loeb, Micah Shapiro, Colter Gerber, Apostalos and Demetrius Karabotsos.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of the Jamie Lynn series, Jamie talks about how the creativity of the artists and skateboarders Mark Gonzales and Neil Blender guides his approach to life as a snowboarder and artist. Featuring Circe Wallace, Matt Cummins, Dano Pendygrasse, Joel Gomez, Scott Sullivan, and Matt Remine.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 03
programme.desc: In Episode 3 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, we talk with a pioneering professional snowboarder and filmmaker, an iconic 90s shredder, and a Tahoe photographer about Jamie Lynn. Join us for tales of guts, gusto, and good jumping genes. Featuring Dave Seoane, Peter Line, and Ruben Sanchez.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 04
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series we talk with a handful of Jamie’s fellow athletes and industry peers about his loyalties to Sessions, Volcom, Vans, and LibTech among other sponsors. Featuring Joel Gomez, Dave Seoane, Richard Woolcott, Bryan Iguchi, Mike Parillo, and Billy Anderson.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 05
programme.desc: In Episode 5 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Terje Haakonsen shares his insights on Mr. Lynn. From annual meet-ups at Mt. Baker to destinations around the world, Terje takes you there. Featuring Terje Haakonsen, Bryan Iguchi, Richard Woolcott, Ryan Immegart, Mike Parillo, and Troy Eckert.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 06
programme.desc: In Episode 6 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Jamie details the process of filming the iconic Volcom snowboarding movie, ‘The Garden,’ directed by Richard Woolcott. Spoiler Alert: The experience was awesome. Featuring Troy Eckert, Tucker Hall, Billy Anderson, Nicholas Adams, and Mike Parillo.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 07
programme.desc: In Episode 7, we set the snowboarding tales aside to go deep on Jamie Lynn’s passion for art-making. Tune-in to learn how Lynn’s tight-knit crew motivated one another, both on and off the hill, to pursue parallel paths in visual art. Featuring Bryan Iguchi, Schoph, Jamie Heinrich and Pete Saari.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 1: California to Arizona
programme.desc: In Episode 1, the Volcom Skate Team ride motorcycles through the California and Arizona deserts, embracing all that the open road has to offer. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Remy Stratton, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 2: Arizona to Utah
programme.desc: In Episode 2, the Volcom Skate Team find themselves motorcycling and skateboarding through Arizona and Utah, with a stop at the Grand Canyon. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Remy Stratton, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 3: Belgium to Germany
programme.desc: In Episode 3, the Volcom Skate Team motorcycle through Belgium and Germany, ride skateboards, and visit The Picturebooks. Featuring Jonathan Thijs, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Fynn Grabke, Phillip Mirtschink, Claus Grabke, and Baumi.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 4: Germany to Denmark
programme.desc: In Episode 4, the Volcom Skate Team ride through Germany and Denmark. In Copenhagen, they visit Motorious, a vintage motorcycle shop. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Chris Pfanner, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Jelle Keppens, Jonathan Thijs and Kasper Krogh.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 6: Mexico
programme.desc: In this bonus episode, skaters CJ Collins, Jackson Pilz, and others ride motorcycles between Mexico City and San Miguel de Allende. Featuring Collin Provost, CJ Collins, Braulio Sagas, Kervin Miranda, Luka Barrena, Arto Saari, Diego Espinoza, Ginther Estrada, Ryan Loughridge, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Teenrager
programme.desc: Skater CJ Collins is now part of the Toy Machine Blood Sucking Skateboard Company. To celebrate his son’s 13th birthday, father Chad Collins made a 13-minute edit of CJ footage he’s been compiling over the years. As the title says, CJ’s not a teenager, he’s a teenrager!

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Neverland
programme.desc: Neverland is a state of mind, a mountain pushed up from the ground by imagination. Anyone can go but most people have trouble with the simple directions: Follow your dreams.

programme.title: Sparks
programme.desc: Take a pow trip around the world and into the mind of Wolle Nyvelt to find out why his passion for snowboarding runs so deep. From his legendary tenure as a rider to his work shaping pow surfers with Asmo, Wolle has dedicated his life to the culture of sliding sideways. "Sparks is the exploration into what makes snowboarding so fun and exciting to us all. It’s an interpretation of our lifestyle; the culture of building boards, riding mountains, and the adventure of choosing this path.” - Wolle Nyvelt

programme.title: Äsmosphere
programme.desc: Äsmosphere is the surf-influenced creation of Wolfgang Nyvelt showcasing his craftsmanship and appreciation for the glide and the turns we take on snow. After 16 years of filming legendary video parts, freeriding is now at the forefront of Wolle’s mind.

programme.title: Inaka
programme.desc: ‘Inaka’ is a short film about Iwanai, ‘the hidden beauty’ of Hokkaido. Snowboarders Wolfgang Nyvelt, Garrett Warnick and Bode Merrill drop everything and head to the North Island of Japan in search of good times and backcountry powder. Filmed by Billabong ambassador and filmmaker Chris Burkard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Optimistic?
programme.desc: For those who live to snowboard, climate change can present an impossible challenge or become a catalyst for creativity. It all depends on how you look at it. In the movie Optimistic?, Absinthe Films follows 15 riders as they each explore the effects of global warming. Timely. Innovative. Positive.

programme.title: Hillside Project - Prototyping in Mayrhofen
programme.desc: This past year, Louif Paradis and Harrison Gordon visited Wolle’s hometown of Mayrhofen to better understand the complex prototyping process and to see where Wolle carved his teeth as a snowboarder and a shaper. Filmed by David Vladyka Riding: Wolle Nyvelt Harrison Gordon Louif Paradis Victor Daviet

programme.title: Hillside Project - Rizumu
programme.desc: An intergenerational exploration of Japan in search of rhythm, flow, and incredibly deep snow. Each year Wolle Nyvelt and a select crew of snowboarders set out to explore new terrain and test different shapes within the Hillside Project Series. After being closed to travel for the last couple of years, Japan was the obvious choice. Needless to say, the crew composed of Wolle, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis and Luke Lund scored. Featuring: Wolle Nyvelt, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis, Luke Lund Filmed by David Vladyka

programme.title: Hillside Project - Äsmo Factory
programme.desc: Making boards at the Äsmo factory! Featuring Josh Dirksen, Max Buri and Wolfgang Nyvelt

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 03
programme.desc: Some of the greatest pro snowboarders to ever do it, claim Josh Dirksen as their favorite rider to watch. His Microdose story continues, taking on new dimensions with perspectives from more of his MtBachelor Bend Oregon crew: Kevin Jones, Todd Richards, Trevor Graves, Embry Rucker and Robbie Morrow

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 04
programme.desc:
Growing up snowboarding the natural wind features of Mt. Bachelor played a big part in shaping Josh Dirksen's unique and seemingly effortless riding style. He seamlessly transferred his surf and skateboard influenced smoothness to a new audience, when he started filming with Kingpin Productions.
Featuring: Gerry Lopez, Travis Yamada, Kevin Jones, Trevor Graves, Rob Morrow, Allister Schultz, Chad Otterstrom, "Whitey" Rob McConnaughey

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Down For This
programme.desc: Down For This is a rollercoaster of adrenaline and heartfelt emotion in a 1-hour-25-minute slide of 30 years past to present. Featuring some of the most memorable Volcom skating surfing and snowboarding.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 1
programme.desc: In Chapter One of Side Hits Euphoria, snowboarders Oli Gittler and Arthur Longo showcase their favorite features to ride; random jumps and hits on the side of the piste. They spent their season capturing these little treasures hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 2
programme.desc: Chapter 2 of Side Hits Euphoria features resort riding, side hits, and random stuff on the slopes. In December 2018, the snowboarders Oli Gittler and Arthur Longo filmed everything they found during their travels to Mount Seymour in Canada, and in Laax and Arêches-Beaufort in Switzerland.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 3
programme.desc: Side Hits Euphoria is back! Chapter 3 features resort riding, side bonking, groomer gliding, and pure shredding. Filmed by the snowboarders Olivier Gittler and Arthur Longo in December of 2019, in and around Tignes, Val d’Isère, Avoriaz and Chamonix, France. Thanks for watching!

programme.title: Creedlecosm
programme.desc: Volcom presents CreedleCosm, a snowboarding cinematic masterpiece. Starring Mike Rav, Scott Blum, Desiree Melancon, Egan Wint, Seb Picaro, Arthur Longo, Torgeir Bergrem, Pat Moore, Bryan Iguchi, Jadyn Chomlack, Juliette Pelchat, Estelle Pensiero, Jamie Lynn, Alec Majerus and Simon Bannerot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Crosspollution
programme.desc: High voltage shred flick from the Volcom Skateboarding and Snowboarding teams. Starring Benny Milam, Cody Warble, Reid Smith, Lenny Mazzotti, Jack Harold, Scott Blum, Christian Connors, CJ Collins, Axel Cruysberghs, Alec Majerus, Henry Gartland and Mike Ravelson. Edited by Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Inexact Odyssey
programme.desc: ‘Inexact Odyssey’ is a film about unexpected adventure and endless opportunity. From the winding canyons of Zion National Park to the high alpine passes of Arlberg, Austria, filmmaker Seth Huot uses his Super-8 camera to capture spontaneous travels and impromptu sessions with the Volcom Snow team.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Tchin Tchin
programme.desc: In ‘Tchin Tchin’, the Pusher Bearings crew head to the South of France to do flip tricks and jump off cliffs. Featuring the skateboarding of Kilian Zehnder, Titi Gormit, Robin Fournier, Anto Lopez, Davide Holznecht, and Simon Perottet.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Outta Bounds
programme.desc: Thrasher Magazine and Pusher Bearings present ‘Outta Bounds,’ featuring ledges, hip-hop and skate plazas. Pusher’s international team of technicians knows the recipe. Kilian Zehnder, Nick Dias, Carlos Iqui and more bring the flow from South America to Spain.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Alive In Engadin
programme.desc: Do you like beautiful Swiss valleys? Do you like skateboarding? Yes, and yes. Watch photographer Filip Zuan and cinematographer Christian Taro spend a weekend capturing extraordinary spots with the skateboarders Christoph Rediger and Alessandro Magnani. A feast for the eyes and the senses.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Suscht Guet
programme.desc: SUSCHT GUET is a Swiss skateboard film by Shqipron Bobaj and Tomas Schneider. Featuring Aaron Ulrich, Célian Cordt-Moller, David Nideröst, Dino Brandão, Fabio Prosdocimi, Fin Broder, Flavio Zimmermann, Jànos Herzog, Jeron Breschan, Lorenzo Zuber, Oliver Weismantel, Lukas Bigun, Mike Sidi and more.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Worldly Goods
programme.desc: To celebrate the release of his collection, Louie Lopez spent a week stacking clips between breezy San Francisco and blazing hot Sacramento with a crew of his longtime Volcom teammates; Alec Majerus, Collin Provost, Amos Wilton and Simon Bannerot. Filmed by Ryan Lee, Taylor Phillips and Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Vitals
programme.desc: The Volcom Skate Team putting their latest Vitals Collection to the test in the streets of Los Angeles, California. Featuring Louie Lopez, Collin Provost, Grant Taylor, Axel Cruysberghs, CJ Collins and Chris Pfanner. Filmed by Ryan Lee and Calvin Millar. Edited by Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Que Saguaro
programme.desc: In ‘Que Saguaro’, Volcom charges through the spillways and street spots of the Southwestern U.S. with Milton Martinez, Collin Provost, Omar Hassan, Mathias Torres, Alec Majerus, Simon Bannerot, CJ Collins, Peter Hewitt, Remy Stratton, Tom Remmilard, Jarrod Pimental, Jaime Lynn and Scott Blum.

programme.title: The Olin Sisters - Pachamama
programme.desc: A sun-drenched short film about soul, surf and sisterhood. Pachamama follows Mathea and Sanoa Olin’s journey to become professional surfers in the harsh coldwater waves off the west coast of Canada. Filmed by director Ross Allen during The Rip Curl Pro Tofino.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Happy Recluse
programme.desc: For many years Pete Devries and Jeremy Koreski have been on a mission to surf the best waves Vancouver Island has to offer. In particular, they return again and over to a wave with potential for a legendary session. In the process, Pete tells of his life as a ”Happy Recluse," at home in cold water.

programme.title: Roxy Presents: New Colors
programme.desc: Faced with the winter waters of Norway, four female professional surfers step out of their comfort zone, push their boundaries and redefine their approach to surfing. Beyond competition sites, they reconnect with the pleasure of sharing their passion through a unique cold water experience.

programme.title: Billabong Presents: The Cape
programme.desc: What happens when good winds, good weather, and a solid swell come together along one of the rawest stretches of coastline on the planet? You don't stop. Surfers Taj Burrow, Shaun Manners, Jaleesa Vincent, and Matt Bromley test their staying power on this Adventure Division strike mission.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: The Backyard
programme.desc: At Pipeline there is flora, fauna, ocean and stone. Volcom Stone. At this point, the Volcom house is practically part of the reef. Between the team, the family, the legacy, the peanut gallery, the respect, the Pipe Pro and the barbecues, you’d be hard pressed not to notice Volcom on the North Shore.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: XO - Coco Ho
programme.desc: Step into the world of pro surfer Coco Ho. Raised on Oahu’s North Shore, the film explores how Ho got started in the water, her surfing family history, and the ups and downs of the Championship Tour. Featuring brother Mason Ho, father Michael Ho, and surfers John John Florence and Stephanie Gilmore.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Tweakin' On Boards With Ryan Burch
programme.desc: Tweakin’ on Boards was shot in 2009. Seems like a second ago and forever ago. Truth is it’s both. As a surfer and filmmaker, Burch isn’t content complaining everything's already been done. Says fellow surfer Cyrus Sutton, “He needs to FEEL history for himself.” This film is that and more.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Lay Down Your Weapons
programme.desc: “Lay Down Your Weapons” is a respite from the cacophony of the world. Atoms and Void is musician Arlie Carstens, of Seattle’s Juno, and producer Eric Fisher. Known for his skateboarding films, Director Greg Hunt here lets landscapes and cityscapes slowly unfold. Breathe deeply, watch and listen.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 1: Don’t Lie Down
programme.desc: In 1953, W. Horace Carter won the Pulitzer Prize for his editorials opposing the KKK. This brave work lead to the FBI’s takedown of the Carolina Klans. Today, The Carters continue to champion civil rights and the environment. Grandson Wes Carter now fights for the world’s waterways. Don’t lie down.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 2: Plastic, Plastic, Everywhere
programme.desc: We join pro surfer and Journey To A New Earth advocate Koa Smith to learn about the problem of microplastics on Oahu’s North Shore. We explore efforts underway to fix the issue and spotlight a few of the ways entrepreneurs are utilizing the reclaimed materials to develop new innovative products.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 3: Walking the Walk
programme.desc: Ron Artisi has sandy toes. When taking a closer look with the crew from Sustainable Coastlines Hawaii, his world is shattered. Bob Hurley shares the tale of a young woman building an army to clean the rivers in Bali. Wes Carter explores Fishbone Carriers, the alternative to plastic 6-pack rings.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 4: No More Bubbles
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of Journey to a New Earth, Wes Carter of Atlantic Packaging talks with water photographer Clark Little, shaper Jon Pyzel, and big wave rider Kai Lenny. They join the journey, offering insights and solutions for the problematic issue of single-use plastics in the surf industry.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 5: Clean This Mess Up
programme.desc: In Episode 5, we talk with 11x World Surf League Champion, Kelly Slater, about the growing problem of plastic pollution around the world. We learn about the ways he’s chosen to make a difference with his company, Outerknown, and discuss the power of community to make real and lasting change.

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 6: Jaws of Consumerism
programme.desc: Olympic Gold Medalist and 5x World Champion, Carissa Moore, shares how people and brands can eliminate single-use plastics. Juan Oliphant and Ocean Ramsey explain how shark populations are a crucial barometer for the health of our oceans. Florence Marine X talks sustainable solutions in packaging!

programme.title: Journey To A New Earth - Episode 7: Decisions
Journey To A New Earth - Episode 8: Let’s Change This
Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Nippow Holiday
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen invites the filmmaker and musician, Leo Cittadella, to join him and Rip Zinger on a powder trip to Hokkaido, Japan. Along the way, they meet up with Nicolas Müller and Mikkel Bang to film for the Absinthe Films feature "TurboDojo.”

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo One
programme.desc: On his 45th trip to Japan (since 1991), Terje rides powder in the Japanese Alps with the snowboarders Leo Cittadella, Rip Zinger, Curtis Ciszek, Oli Gittler and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Two
programme.desc: The snowboarders Rip Zinger and Terje Haakonsen ride powder in Japan. Years after his recovery from a debilitating head injury, they get Kevin Pearce back on snow. Join us for this episode of friendship, freshies, and freeriding.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Three
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen explores the joys of Japanese mountain culture with his friends Kevin Pearce, Mikkel Bang, Rip Zinger, Oli Gittler, Curtis Ciszek, Leo Cittadella and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Relax If You Can
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen and Leo Cittadella go snowskating at the vast Austrian ski resort of Ischgl. While enjoying a timeout along the Swiss-Austrian border, they discuss European cultural differences and similarities.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Half Banked at Mt Baker
programme.desc: Terje and Leo Cittadella head to Mt. Baker, Washington to meet up with with Russell Winfield and Rip Zinger to compete in the 33rd Legendary Banked Slalom. During a windstorm, a tree falls on the house while everyone is asleep. Terje gets waxing tips from Olympic gold medalist Seth Westcott.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Attunga - A Higher Place
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three Norwegian snowboarders: legendary purist Terje Haakonsen, holistic-minded Torgeir Bergrem, and carefree wunderkind Marcus Kleveland. Watch as filmmaker and snowboarder Seth Huot pulls back the curtain to examine their common purpose, potential, pitfalls, and paychecks.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Futureproof
programme.desc: In shred world, Absinthe Films’ "Futureproof" is widely regarded as a stone cold classic. This movie showcases iconic performances from many of the best riders to ever do it, including Romain De Marchi, JP Solberg, Trevor Andrew Wolfgang Nyvelt and Gigi Rüf.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Nippow Holiday
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen invites the filmmaker and musician, Leo Cittadella, to join him and Rip Zinger on a powder trip to Hokkaido, Japan. Along the way, they meet up with Nicolas Müller and Mikkel Bang to film for the Absinthe Films feature "TurboDojo.”

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo One
programme.desc: On his 45th trip to Japan (since 1991), Terje rides powder in the Japanese Alps with the snowboarders Leo Cittadella, Rip Zinger, Curtis Ciszek, Oli Gittler and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Two
programme.desc: The snowboarders Rip Zinger and Terje Haakonsen ride powder in Japan. Years after his recovery from a debilitating head injury, they get Kevin Pearce back on snow. Join us for this episode of friendship, freshies, and freeriding.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Three
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen explores the joys of Japanese mountain culture with his friends Kevin Pearce, Mikkel Bang, Rip Zinger, Oli Gittler, Curtis Ciszek, Leo Cittadella and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Relax If You Can
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen and Leo Cittadella go snowskating at the vast Austrian ski resort of Ischgl. While enjoying a timeout along the Swiss-Austrian border, they discuss European cultural differences and similarities.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Half Banked at Mt Baker
programme.desc: Terje and Leo Cittadella head to Mt. Baker, Washington to meet up with with Russell Winfield and Rip Zinger to compete in the 33rd Legendary Banked Slalom. During a windstorm, a tree falls on the house while everyone is asleep. Terje gets waxing tips from Olympic gold medalist Seth Westcott.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Attunga - A Higher Place
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three Norwegian snowboarders: legendary purist Terje Haakonsen, holistic-minded Torgeir Bergrem, and carefree wunderkind Marcus Kleveland. Watch as filmmaker and snowboarder Seth Huot pulls back the curtain to examine their common purpose, potential, pitfalls, and paychecks.

programme.title: Artist Profile - José Medeles
programme.desc: For most artists, music is a way of life. On this episode of the Artist Profile series, we follow José Medeles through a day in the life as he shares his journey from La Salle, Illinois to touring with The Breeders, to founding the Revival Drum Shop and making music as one half of 1939 Ensemble.

programme.title: Marmoset Presents: Bridge City Revival
programme.desc: Bridge City Revival is the acclaimed music collective from Portland, Oregon. Inspired by the soulful 60s, BCR was raised on The Chi-Lites, Otis Redding, Isley Brothers, Lee Fields, and Sharon Jones. Banger drum breaks. Driving bass. Rhythmic guitar. Rolling keyboards. Soulful brass. That’s BCR!

programme.title: Artist Profile - WebsterX
programme.desc: In this episode, we focus our cameras on the hip-hop artist WebsterX as he prepares for his hometown performance at the summer TDM Festival in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. FIlmed by Josh Brine and Kale Chesney.

programme.title: Visitations - La Sera: Devil’s Hearts Grow Gold
programme.desc: La Sera performing "Devils Hearts Grow Gold" at Room 205. A few days before embarking on their first UK tour, mastermind Katy Goodman (vox/bass), Jennifer Prince (guitar/vox), and Jonathan Weil (drums), stopped by to blast through a few songs from Katy's upcoming full-length on Hardly Art.

programme.title: Visitations - La Sera: Never Come Around
programme.desc: La Sera performing 'Never Come Around' at Room 205. A few days before embarking on their first UK tour, La Sera stopped by Room 205 to play songs from the band’s upcoming LP on Hardly Art. The project's inspiration springs from an attraction to ethereal choral vocals and pop hits of the 1950's.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Lay Down Your Weapons
programme.desc: “Lay Down Your Weapons” is a respite from the cacophony of the world. Atoms and Void is musician Arlie Carstens, of Seattle’s Juno, and producer Eric Fisher. Known for his skateboarding films, Director Greg Hunt here lets landscapes and cityscapes slowly unfold. Breathe deeply, watch and listen.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Waves Of Blood
programme.desc: The core of Atoms and Void is formed in the friendship and songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. “Waves of Blood” features cartwheeling post-rock guitars, buoyant bass, and double-drummers bashing away like shutters in a hurricane. Good for long walks and red-eye flights.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - This Departing Landscape
programme.desc: Atoms and Void is formed in the songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. The video for the song, “This Departing Landscape,” is an awkwardly beautiful collection of footage from years of touring and recording, proving the maxim, “life is about the journey, not the destination.”

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Golden Shivers
programme.desc: Atoms and Void is formed in the songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. “Golden Shivers” is a beautiful piece of ambient electronic music akin to the works of minimalist composers Steve Reich and Meredith Monk. Good for running, dancing, driving, and doing the dishes. Play loud.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Futureproof
programme.desc: In shred world, Absinthe Films’ "Futureproof" is widely regarded as a stone cold classic. This movie showcases iconic performances from many of the best riders to ever do it, including Romain De Marchi, JP Solberg, Trevor Andrew Wolfgang Nyvelt and Gigi Rüf.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo One
programme.desc: On his 45th trip to Japan (since 1991), Terje rides powder in the Japanese Alps with the snowboarders Leo Cittadella, Rip Zinger, Curtis Ciszek, Oli Gittler and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: More
programme.desc: Absinthe raises the bar again. 'More' ushers in a new era of urban riding, deep powder, massive jumps, and the groundbreaking ‘Human Drone’ to bring you closer to snowboarding than ever before.

programme.title: Ride Snowboards Presents: Rough Around The Edges
programme.desc: Rough Around The Edges dives into 30 years of Ride Snowboards. Pow days, lawsuits, trespassing, wild decisions, and relentless innovation. A raw, honest look at the brand that shaped modern riding.

programme.title: Live Matchday Build-Up - Live Matchday Build-Up
programme.desc: Pre-match coverage bringing viewers the latest news, team updates, analysis and atmosphere from across the USA during the tournament. Featuring match previews, key talking points, fan reaction and everything you need to know ahead of the day’s biggest games.

programme.title: Live Matchday Build-Up - Live Matchday Build-Up
programme.desc: Pre-match coverage bringing viewers the latest news, team updates, analysis and atmosphere from across the USA during the tournament. Featuring match previews, key talking points, fan reaction and everything you need to know ahead of the day’s biggest games.

programme.title: Live Matchday Build-Up - Live Matchday Build-Up
programme.desc: Pre-match coverage bringing viewers the latest news, team updates, analysis and atmosphere from across the USA during the tournament. Featuring match previews, key talking points, fan reaction and everything you need to know ahead of the day’s biggest games.

programme.title: Live Matchday Build-Up - Live Matchday Build-Up

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - New York City 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in Madison Square Garden in New York City.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - San Francisco 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in the Chase Center in San Francisco, CA.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - World Records Ep. 1
programme.desc: A collection of world records broken by the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Hoops, Hits & Hype With The Globetrotters
programme.desc: The Harlem Globetrotters hit Harlem with Snoop Dogg, teaming up with Steph & Klay for epic trick shots! Plus, a wild HORSE game with MLS Philly Union & NFL’s Marquette King brings the heat across sports. Hoops, hip-hop, and highlight-reel madness — you don’t wanna miss this!

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Gifted Givers
programme.desc: TNT, Cheese, and Hotshot visit an organization that teaches kids the values of Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Math. Hammer tours his adopted hometown of Tampa where he connects with Coach Handles and mentors young athletes. Cheese, Wham, Hammer, and Hotshot learn about some amazing animals at a theme park in Georgia. Plus Coach Lou helps Thunder brush up on his Spanish before heading on tour to Mexico.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - St. Louis 2025
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in Enterprise Center in St. Louis, MO.

programme.title: Quick Cuts - 100 Years of the Harlem Globetrotters: Mandela & Magic
programme.desc: Follow the legendary Harlem Globetrotters on a global tour filled with record-breaking dunks, community impact, and a historic tribute to Nelson Mandela—showcasing why they remain the world’s most beloved basketball entertainers.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: Jet and Coach Lou tell the history of the Globetrotters' storied rivals, the Washington Generals; the Globetrotters come together to make some new world records and to take back some old ones; plus a look at the mechanics of a trick shot by Ace.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Speedy invites Thunder and Bulldog to his hometown of Philadelphia to give back to a barber known for providing haircuts to the homeless. Jet and Coach Lou tell the history of the Globetrotter's storied rivals, the Washington Generals. And Speedy hits the famous courts of Harlem's Rucker Park to break down a one-of-a-kind trick shot. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Celebrities Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Globetrotters spend the day with YouTuber Faze Rug.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Trick Shots Ep. 9
programme.desc: Amazing trick shots from the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Bring It Home
programme.desc: The Globetrotters recount the history of their beloved "Magic Circle." Torch surprises her high school girls' basketball team with new equipment. Plus, Thunder pays a visit to his hometown of Chesapeake, VA.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Love and Basketball
programme.desc: Hotshot, Torch, and Cheese break bread with a LA based group that provides birthday parties to kids experiencing homelessness. Then the Globetrotters partake in a cooking competition with world-renowned chef, Marcus Samuelson. Moose takes the court in Venice Beach to show us the science behind his behind the back shot. Kenny Smith Hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Charity Starts at Home
programme.desc: The Globetrotters visit Bulldog's hometown of Corpus Christi to challenge Little Brothers and Little Sisters to an unforgettable game of basketball and the team trade in their sneaks for cleats.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Beat Of Their Own Drum
programme.desc: Harlem Globetrotters come together to make some new world records and to take back some old ones. Then Wham, Thunder, and Hammer head to New Orleans to meet kids that have fallen in line to learn the drumline. And we break down the science behind Cheese's famous Granny shot. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Globetrotters Player Tribute Ep. 1
programme.desc: A tribute to Harlem Globetrotters players from past and present.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: Jet walks with dads and strollers in park. Thunder and Hammer visit adaptive athlete gym. Team honors a Trotter and Coach. Thunder demos trick shot science. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Hometown Roots
programme.desc: Wham invites his elementary school teacher and her class on a field trip to a wildlife sanctuary in Georgia. Hammer invites Zeus to his adopted hometown of Tampa to enlighten high schoolers on the values of entrepreneurship. Hotshot and Cheese travel to Jet's hometown to support him while he's being honored. And TNT spends quality time with family in her adopted hometown of Charlotte, NC.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Art in the Jet
programme.desc: The Globetrotters join a special program that is revitalizing inner city basketball courts. Cheese gets a galactic lesson on what it takes to prepare food for zero gravity. Jet comes in for a landing in his hometown of Elizabeth, New Jersey, where he gives back at a youth basketball camp. And Wham breaks the world record for most between-the-leg dribbles in one minute. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Harlem Globetrotters: All-Star Crossover Special
programme.desc: In this star-studded special, the Harlem Globetrotters take their skills beyond the court to challenge professional athletes from the NFL, NBA, MLS, and Olympics. Watch as Simone Biles learns to dunk while teaching the team gymnastics, and Golden State Warrior Klay Thompson tests his range from the Globetrotters' legendary 4-point line. The episode also features a showdown with MLS star Tommy Thompson, a football skit with Le’Veon Bell and the Pittsburgh Steelers, and rhythmic gymnastics challenges with Team USA’s Camilla Feeley.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Globetrotters History Ep. 2
programme.desc: Celebrating the legacy of the Harlem Globetrotters with iconic profiles and unforgettable moments as we journey through decades of dazzling skills, humor, and global impact.

The Globetrotters help a deserving family win a brand new micro-home.

programme.desc: The Globetrotters visit a school in the Dominican Republic teaching kids the virtues of harvesting their own crops, recount the history of their beloved "magic circle".

Hammer, Hotshot, Torch, and Coach Lou visit a youth football league in South LA to learn how coaches are inspiring the community. Plus, Hotshot and Cheese hit the court in LA to challenge some locals to a pickup game.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Sunshine Day
programme.desc: TNT alongside Jet and his daughter realize just how precious the simple things are on the shores of Sebago Lake. TNT and Torch reminisce on their early days of blazing the trail for a new generation of female Globetrotters. And TNT doesn't look twice as she sinks an amazing shot in New York's famous Rucker Park. Kenny Smith Hosts.

programme.title: Quick Cuts - Mr. Basketball’s Journey: 75 Years of Globetrotter Magic
programme.desc: This documentary-style content chronicles the rich history and legacy of the Harlem Globetrotters, from their founding in 1926 to their rise as world-class athletes and entertainers. It highlights their groundbreaking 1948 victory over the Minneapolis Lakers, which helped legitimize black athletes in professional basketball. The story focuses on Mannie Jackson, a former player turned executive, who saved the team from extinction in the 1990s and revitalized their global brand. The Globetrotters’ influence on basketball, their unique blend of comedy and athleticism, and their philanthropic efforts around the world are also showcased, cementing their place as an iconic basketball and entertainment institution.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Trick Shots & Tea Parties
programme.desc: Wham, Cheese and Hammer learn about the construction industry; Torch, Hammer, and Hot Shot head to Broward, Florida, to meet The Embrace Girls Foundation; a nonprofit encouraging at-risk girls and uplifting tea parties.; Thunder throwback to his trick shot gauntlet at an abandoned warehouse.; Torch, Hammer, Wham, and Hot Shot take an unforgettable journey to Australia. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Quick Cuts - The People of the Globe: 75 Years of Globetrotter Magic
programme.desc: At the LA Sports Arena, the Globetrotters showcase their newest generation of talent while honoring 75 years of tradition.

programme.desc: Bulldog joins Jet and his daughter to discover the secrets of marine conservation at Hampton Beach. Then, TNT alongside Jet and his daughter realize just how precious the simple things are on the shores of Sebago Lake. And Thunder proves his vertical lift is as impressive as ever. Kenny Smith Hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Cooking with STEAM
programme.desc: Hammer, Hotshot, Torch, and Coach Lou visit a youth football league in South LA to learn how the coaches are inspiring the community. Torch travels to Malaysia with Scooter to connect with some special locals. Plus, Jet brings Cheese, Hotshot, and Hops to an LA Shelter to cook for their residents.

programme.title: 100 Years Of The Harlem Globetrotters - Harlem Globetrotters vs. the World - The Amazing Race All-Stars!
programme.desc: Get ready for a slam dunk of an adventure as Harlem Globetrotters Flight Time and Big Easy take on The Amazing Race All-Stars! From assembling toy cars in China and rappelling down roaring waterfalls in Malaysia to sewing shirts in Sri Lanka and navigating the ancient steps of Rome, these athletes face it all with a smile. Watch as they battle smoking taxis, navigate chaotic tuk-tuk lines, and even compete in a remote-controlled chariot race, proving that teamwork and a positive attitude are their greatest weapons. Will their undeniable rhythm and endless hustle be enough to keep them ahead of the pack?

programme.title: Quick Cuts - World-Record Dunk at Disney: 75 Years of Globetrotter Magic
programme.desc: This video features the Harlem Globetrotters showcasing their legendary basketball skills and entertaining performances. The footage highlights record-breaking moments, fan interactions, and the history of the team, emphasizing their global impact and influence on the sport. From exciting game highlights and interviews with players like Shawn Williams to behind-the-scenes glimpses of their tours and community engagement programs, the video celebrates the Harlem Globetrotters' legacy as the greatest entertainers and ambassadors of basketball. It also touches on their milestone 20,000th game, their brand growth under owner Mannie Jackson, and their commitment to youth through summer basketball camps.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Gone Skydiving
programme.desc: Hammer takes his slam dunk to new heights with a sky-high trick shot. Wham and TNT pay homage to the legendary Globetrotter Coach "Sweet Lou" Dunbar. programme.desc: Get ready for a slam dunk of an adventure as Harlem Globetrotters Flight Time and Big Easy take on The Amazing Race All-Stars! From assembling toy cars in China and rappelling down roaring waterfalls in Malaysia to sewing shirts in Sri Lanka and navigating the ancient steps of Rome, these athletes face it all with a smile. Watch as they battle smoking taxis, navigate chaotic tuk-tuk lines, and even compete in a remote-controlled chariot race, proving that teamwork and a positive attitude are their greatest weapons. Will their undeniable rhythm and endless hustle be enough to keep them ahead of the pack?

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Gifted Givers
programme.desc: TNT, Cheese, and Hotshot visit an organization that teaches kids the values of Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Math. Hammer tours his adopted hometown of Tampa where he connects with Coach Handles and mentors young athletes. Cheese, Wham, Hammer, and Hotshot learn about some amazing animals at a theme park in Georgia. Plus Coach Lou helps Thunder brush up on his Spanish before heading on tour to Mexico.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Trick Shots & Tea Parties
programme.desc: Wham, Cheese and Hammer learn about the construction industry; Torch, Hammer, and Hot Shot head to Broward, Florida, to meet The Embrace Girls Foundation; a nonprofit encouraging at-risk girls and uplifting tea parties.; Thunder throwback to his trick shot gauntlet at an abandoned warehouse.; Torch, Hammer, Wham, and Hot Shot take an unforgettable journey to Australia. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Urban Farming
programme.desc: A young man's life is changed forever when he overcomes bullying with the encouragement from the team. Wham and Hammer venture off the court and on to the farm to learn valuable skills in food cultivation and healthy living. TNT, Torch, Wham, and Hammer get a history lesson from Coach Lou when he puts a twist on a classic playground game of, Knockout.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Knocked Out
programme.desc: Spelling Bee champion and basketball star, Zaila Avant Garde, meets with Coach Lou and receives a lesson in the Globetrotters' innovative trick shots. TNT, Torch, Wham, and Hammer learn about cooking nutritious meals through a healthy competition. Hammer and Torch explore their entrepreneurial passions as they are encouraged by an Atlanta gelato company. TNT, Torch, Wham, and Hammer get a history lesson from Coach Lou when he puts a twist on a classic playground game of, Knockout.

programme.title: Play It Forward - From Bullied to Brave
programme.desc: Globetrotters TNT, Torch, Wham, and Hammer shed light on the "Art in the Paint" initiative, which helps create artful basketball courts in communities that need them the most. Cheese, Bulldog, Hot Shot, and Jet meet with local D.C. youth to support their mission for clean water and self-reliance.; A young man's life is changed forever when he overcomes bullying with the encouragement from the team. And Hammer takes his slam dunk to new heights with his skydive trick shot.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Slammin' Street Ball
programme.desc: The Globetrotters learn the benefits of verse with "Street Poets." The team tells their history of being goodwill ambassadors. Plus, they surprise coach and mentor Chris "Handles" Franklin by honoring him at his community event in Harrisburg, PA.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Charity Starts at Home
programme.desc: The Globetrotters visit Bulldog's hometown of Corpus Christi to challenge Little Brothers and Little Sisters to an unforgettable game of basketball and the team trade in their sneaks for cleats.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Scoring Points for the Community
programme.desc: Cheese and Wham learn about kids on the spectrum at The Ed Asner Family Center; the team surprises coach and mentor Chris "Handles" Franklin by honoring him at his community.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Ambassadors of Goodwill
programme.desc: Cheese and TNT empower inner-city youth who are fighting back against violence. Hammer, Cheese, and TNT trade in the wood-grain for the ice rink in Chicago. Globetrotter Max 'Hops' Pearce unveils his unique artwork. Bulldog, Wham, and TNT join a group of wounded veterans for an extraordinary encounter with whale sharks in Atlanta.

programme.title: Fighting Spirit Wrestling
programme.desc: FSW is our own production with a similar structure to Fighting Spirit MMA. We carefully select the best matches from top Japanese and Mexican promotions. Fighting Spirit Wrestling is the perfect blend of flashiness, wrestling, and entertainment. The Mexican Lucha Libre and the Japanese Puroresu styles display plenty of high-flying maneuvers, breath-taking moves, and unbelievable acrobatic sequences that will surely get any audience up on their feet!

programme.title: Fighting Spirit Wrestling
programme.desc: FSW is our own production with a similar structure to Fighting Spirit MMA. We carefully select the best matches from top Japanese and Mexican promotions. Fighting Spirit Wrestling is the perfect blend of flashiness, wrestling, and entertainment. The Mexican Lucha Libre and the Japanese Puroresu styles display plenty of high-flying maneuvers, breath-taking moves, and unbelievable acrobatic sequences that will surely get any audience up on their feet!

programme.title: Michelin 24H Series
programme.desc: Twelve hours of relentless GT endurance racing at the legendary Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps. Round 2 of the 2026 Michelin 24H Series European Series sees elite GT3 machinery battle through daylight, dusk, and darkness across the fearsome Belgian Ardennes — where strategy, stamina, and the weather all decide the winner.

programme.title: MotoAmerica: Talent Cup
programme.desc: Round 2 of the 2026 MotoAmerica Talent Cup arrives at Road Atlanta with the championship already tightly contested. A lead group of young riders refuses to be separated throughout the eight-lap battle, with multiple lead changes keeping the crowd on its feet all the way to a photo-finish that separates the top three by less than half a second.

programme.title: MotoAmerica: Talent Cup
programme.desc: Sunday's red-flag-shortened Talent Cup finale at Road Atlanta delivers another breathtaking conclusion, as three riders go three-wide into the final corners in a last-lap dash. The podium is settled by just over two-tenths of a second, a new lap record is set, and the championship standings tighten heading into round three.

programme.title: FIA Karting European Championship
programme.desc: Round 3 marked the opening of the KZ and KZ2 categories in the European Championship. The Lucas Guerrero circuit, known for its technical layout and fast corners, provided a challenging environment for the drivers.

programme.title: FIA Karting European Championship
programme.desc: Back in Italy at the stunning new Leopard Circuit in Viterbo, Round 4 of the FIA European Karting Championship takes place

programme.title: Planet Speed
programme.desc: GT World Challenge action spans continents as endurance racing begins its European season alongside rally and global motorsport highlights.

programme.title: Planet Speed
programme.desc: Motorsport action spans the globe with endurance racing, touring cars, and rally competition delivering high-speed drama across multiple championships.

programme.title: MotoAmerica: Supersport
programme.desc: The Supersport field heads to Road Atlanta for a charged season opener, with history made before a wheel is even turned in anger as a rider qualifies on pole for the very first time in MotoAmerica Supersport history. A former MotoGP rider makes an immediate impression on his first-ever sprint race start, while championship leader Tyler Scott looks to build on his Daytona 200 success, and Josh Herrin faces a dramatic recovery ride from the back of the pack.

programme.title: MotoAmerica: QuadLock Superbike
programme.desc: The 50th season of American Superbike racing gets underway at Road Atlanta, as six classes take to the iconic Georgia circuit. A new face leads the charge in the premier class as a former Supersport champion makes his long-awaited return to the Superbike paddock, while defending six-time champion Cameron Beaubier fights through the field after starting from the back of the grid.

programme.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed 2025
programme.desc: Motorsport’s greatest summer celebration, featuring legendary race cars, F1 stars, supercars, and thrilling hill climbs from the iconic Goodwood Estate.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Get Your Hands Dirty
programme.desc: Mark installs the hood decal on the '70 Sunroof Challenger, Holly helps Josh disassemble the Barracuda suspension, Mark and Daren work on the 440 engine for the Challenger, and the team assembles one of the rarest Mopar options, the sunroof for the '70 Challenger.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - W-O-M-A-N, Mark Woman
programme.desc: The team rushes to ready the '69 Dodge Daytona for Tom Partridge and his family's visit. The guys settle a leadership dispute the old fashioned way, the Graveyard Carz van gets a face lift, and Daren retaliates when Mark won't let him sign for deliveries.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Pop Secrets
programme.desc: Holly helps Mark on the '70 Challenger, Daren annoys everyone with his popcorn and causes Mark to damage a very rare car. Tony D'Agostino, from Tony's Mopar Parts, visits and lends a hand on the '70 sunroof Challenger. Mark lets Holly in on the big secret and Daren reveals a secret of his own.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Let the Sunshine In
programme.desc: Mark gets a portable showroom, the '70 Hemi Charger is dissembled and the team finishes the 1970 Sunroof Challenger. Mark finally reveals his big secret project to the Graveyard Carz team and Royal makes a video tribute to the Sunroof Challenger.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - The Royal Treatment
programme.desc: Mark and the ghouls build out the 440 Super Commando engine for their '70 Plymouth Superbird and install the suspension for the '69 Daytona Charger. Daren finally has enough of Mark's foolishness.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - The Grand Torino
programme.desc: Body man Derrick becomes an official Graveyard Carz crew member and assists in the disassembly of the rare '67 Plymouth Hemi GTX Convertible. Josh and Daren play "the game" with Mark.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - The Waltons
programme.desc: Mark and the Ghoulz get a massive sheet-metal order from AMD for their '70 Plymouth Superbird. Meanwhile, the owners of the '72 Charger visit and talk about what made their car so special. Daren gets the offer of a lifetime on his '70 Challenger R/T.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - It's the Great Pumpkin, Goldberg!
programme.desc: It's a Moparween at Graveyard Carz! Just when things couldn't get crazier, Bill Goldberg shows up to go over his '68 GTX Convertible and knock some sense into the guys. He can handle the NFL and the WCW, but can he hold his own at GYC?

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Super Wiring
programme.desc: Find out what goes into the electrical wiring on a new age Super Car….not as much as you might think.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Monster Muscle
programme.desc: Every muscle car should have the power to match its looks, so Bryan and Byrd add a monster overdrive transmission to a 1972 Chevelle.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Café Racer
programme.desc: Kevin and Bryan bring out their 1977 CB550 motorcycle project. Kevin handles the electronics and Bryan custom fabricates the exhaust.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Roadster Frame
programme.desc: Kevin and Bryan begin work on a custom 1930’s roadster. This is not your typical roadster renovation…it is a true custom build up that begins with fabricating the frame from scratch!

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Carb Re-Build
programme.desc: Kevin and Bryan continue re-building our 67 Camaro by rebuilding the quadra-jet carburetor.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Nova Project
programme.desc: Bryan does some welding on a 66 Nova while Kevin takes a trip to the dyno to dial in the new EFI system for the small block engine.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - No Smoking
programme.desc: Bryan tightens the bumper on a 1969 Chevy Van and Kevin lights a fire with the wrong gauge wire.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Maintenance Show
programme.desc: Bryan and Kevin put a stop to the shakes on a 2006 Nissan. Also find out what happened when a graffiti artist put his mark on our garage.

programme.title: Truck U - Rock Racer
programme.desc: The Chassis for the Rock Racer is almost done, so Matt and Bruno add a Speedwire System and install the torque converter.

programme.title: Truck U - Small Engine
programme.desc: Matt and Bruno replace a small engine on a go kart and get some help from some kids on a special project.

programme.title: Truck U - Work and Play #1
programme.desc: Bruno and Matt need to create an ultimate truck for work and play. They get a visit from Clint at ATS Diesel and find out what’s available in the aftermarket for performance.

programme.title: Truck U - Work and Play#2
programme.desc: Work continues on the Dodge Work and Play Project Truck. Today, we help the ride with a wireless air bag system and add some much needed storage capability.

programme.title: Truck U - Steering Geometry
programme.desc: Learn why a truck’s steering geometry is such an important issue to address after installing a lift kit on your truck.

programme.title: Truck U - Fouled up Ford
programme.desc: What causes a misfire in your engine? Follow Bruno and Matt as they travel through a diagnostic journey to find an answer to the problem.

programme.title: Truck U - Toy Hauler Build-Up
programme.desc: Matt and Bruno take an enclosed car trailer and turn it into a toy hauler with all the amenities of home.

programme.title: Truck U - Get It Started
programme.desc: Matt and Bruno diagnose a “no-start problem” on an ‘05 Chevy Silverado and get some help with the repair from NASCAR Crew Chief Alan Gustafson.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Transmission Components
programme.desc: Bryan and Kevin marry an engine transmission and work on patch panels for the Nova project.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Factory Five Tour
programme.desc: Ride along with Kevin Byrd as he takes a pilgrimage to Plymouth with some of his Factory Five friends.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Wiring Demons
programme.desc: 1967 Camaro wiring issues get cleaned up.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - The Inhaler
programme.desc: The Impala is back and ready to breath with a new Kinsler intake.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - The Fueller
programme.desc: Bryan rips apart a brand new Buelle to give it the Fuller touch.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Sam’s New Cummins
programme.desc: Sam Memmolo is back to match wits with Kevin about the new 6.7 diesel Cummins.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Challenging Exhaust
programme.desc: Kevin and Bryan install a new exhaust kit on a new Challenger and then start work on Bryan’s 33 getting it ready for a chop.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Under the Knife
programme.desc: Bryan finally gets to fulfill his dream of chopping the top on his 33.

programme.title: Truck U - Ask the Hosts
programme.desc: Whether they are on the road, or in the garage, Bruno and Matt find answers to technical questions everyday. Today, they will answer some of your viewer questions while working on a new truck.

programme.title: Truck U - Cummins Diesel-Built to Last
programme.desc: One million miles may sound like a lot – but NOT for a Cummins Diesel engine. Today, we’ll find out what makes these incredible engines built to last.

programme.title: Truck U - Back From the Dead
programme.desc: Bruno and Matt bring a 1972 Murdered Out Chevy pickup back from the dead by adding a new front clip and upgrading the brakes.

programme.title: Truck U - Eaton Proving Ground
programme.desc: Today we find the limits to a stock four-wheel drive jeep. As we head out to the Eaton Proving Ground in Marshall, Michigan.

programme.title: Truck U - Overheating
programme.desc: We’ll show what to do when you’re stranded on the side of the road with an overheating problem and teach the right way diagnose and fix the problem.

programme.title: Truck U - Truck Add Ons
programme.desc: Beginner to Expert, we’ve got it all. We take a 2011 Ford and show how some jobs can be easier than others

programme.title: Truck U - Victory Lane Edition
programme.desc: Matt takes a trip to Joplin, Missouri to check in with the guys at Chrome Shop Mafia and find out what makes the Freightliner Victory Lane Edition so unique.

programme.title: Truck U - Duramax Injector Repair
programme.desc: LB7 injectors fail on GM engines all the time. Today we’ll show you why you should do the repair yourself and save thousands in the process.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Daytona Reborn Pt. 1
programme.desc: Mark is behind on his promise to get Tom Partidge's '69 Daytona Charger finished by the end of the month. The crew kicks into high gear to get Tom's Daytona looking great and out the door.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Daytona Reborn Pt. 2
programme.desc: Mark is behind on his promise to get Tom Partridge's '69 Daytona Charger finished by the end of the month. The crew bands together to do whatever is necessary to fulfill Mark's promise to the owner and bring it back to life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Top 10 Mopar Muscle Moments
programme.desc: The Ghoulz pay tribute to their favorite moments over the previous seasons. This special episode looks back over seasons 1-3 of Graveyard Carz, but includes all new interviews to highlight some previously unrevealed details.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - The Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: A 1970 Dodge Charger engine is restored in this Special episode.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Daren and Royal Go Topless
programme.desc: A rare 1970 Charger and a 1970 Barracuda 383 are featured.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - General Disassemble Lee
programme.desc: A 1968 Charger, a 1970 Challenger R/T, and a 1969 Charger are featured.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Mo Money Mo Challengers
programme.desc: A 1972 Dodge Charger is restored.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Drive a Mile in My Shoes
programme.desc: A 1969 Road Runner is featured.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Top Banana Charge
programme.desc: Work on a 1972 Dodge Charger is continued.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Gone Bananas
programme.desc: The story about the 1972 Charger is briefly revisited, and past work leading to its completion is also revisited. Work on the 1972 Dodge Charger is completed and revealed to the owners.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Manifold Destiny
programme.desc: The 1970 Plymouth Superbird work is resumed, and the 1970 Charger R/T collision repair is completed. The 1970 Barracuda Convertible's 383 2bbl. V8 is assembled and painted.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Spoiler Alert
programme.desc: A secret is accidentally revealed by Mark. Mark and Daren visit the local AAMCO Transmissions to watch the overhaul of the 1970 Barracuda Convertible's 727 Automatic Transmission, and then the Barracuda has its A/C box and instrument panel installed. The 1970 Superbird assembly nears completion.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - MoSparring
programme.desc: Automotive parts supplier Tony D'Agostino of Tony's Parts helps the shop get organized, and Mark tests his Mopar knowledge against Tony's. Work on a 1970 Plymouth Superbird is completed.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - The Hills Have Eyes on a Superbird
programme.desc: The 1970 Superbird's restoration and story is recapped, and the Hills visit the shop to take delivery of the car, along with its original owner. Mike and Michael Hill drive the Superbird on a cross county trip home to South Carolina.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Clipped Wings
programme.desc: With the 1970 Plymouth Superbird done and safely driven home, Mark is asked to restore a 1969 Daytona Charger. Due to its condition, Mark questions if it's practical and if it's even legal.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Put Me In, Coach
programme.desc: Just when things couldn't get more stressful, Mark agrees to finally get the 1930 Chevy Coach fully restored by the end of the week. Meanwhile, Mark QC's the next cars in the process of resurrection.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - How to Cook a Barracuda
programme.desc: See the complete 3-year restoration of Kimberly Cook's 1970 Barracuda Convertible: the body, paint, engine, and convertible top, culminating in Graveyard Carz' most emotional reveal to date.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Commando Cuda vs. Magnum Force
programme.desc: New shop. New crew. An All-new Graveyard Carz! The ghouls tackle a 1970 Cuda.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Rallye Red Restored
programme.desc: Mark paints a Hemi Charger in his favorite Mopar color, burnt orange. AMD delivers the Phantom Cuda, and the ghouls finish the Dailey's 1970 Cuda 383, a project four years in the making.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Hell Hath No '58 Fury
programme.desc: The ghouls wrap up the 340 Cuda and install panels on the Hemi Charger. Mark trains Allysa on O.E.M. assembly line markings. The legendary red Plymouth Fury "Christine" visits the shop.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - 400 Magnum Misfire
programme.desc: The ghouls have problems with after-market parts for the 400 Magnum V8. Allysa begins working in the shop, and two rare Mopars are disassembled

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Return of the '70 Sunroof Challenger
programme.desc: Mark's coffee addiction is spotlighted, and the ghouls work on a 1970 Challenger.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - 70 'Cuda Grace
programme.desc: Work on a 1970 Cuda 340 is featured.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Hemi Orange is the New Corporate Blue
programme.desc: The ghouls work on a 1968 GTX for Bill Goldberg, and Mark repairs a Challenger deck lid. Will paints a 1967 Hemi GTX and challenges Mark to a paint-off.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Grand Theft Hemi
programme.desc: Mark teaches Allysa to analyze and document cars in preparation for disassembly, but she later has a crucial lapse in judgement. The ghouls install the 400 Magnum in the 1972 Dodge Charger.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Investigation O.E.
programme.desc: Two rare Mopars, a Daytona survivor and early Hemi Charger, are analyzed for authenticity and restoration.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Chally vs. Chally
programme.desc: The ghouls complete the 1970 V-Code Challenger and make a side-by-side comparison with Mark's 2014 Shaker-hood Challenger.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - HEMI FK5 Alive
programme.desc: A 1970 Hemi Charger is restored.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - Pitch and Rides
programme.desc: The 1970 Hemi Charger project is completed in the season finale.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz - General Assemble Lee
programme.desc: The Graveyard Ghouls return with the final assembly of the legendary General Lee which so happens to also be the official screen-used, record holding, freeway jump-car from the 2005 Dukes of Hazzard film.

programme.title: Rutter's Detailin Garage - Detailing a Motorcoach
programme.desc: Nick Rutter provides valuable tips and techniques for how to detail various aspects of a motorcoach, including wheels and tires, granite care, proper leather care, as well as glass cleaning.

programme.title: Rutter's Detailin Garage - How To Wash Car
programme.desc: Nick Rutter showcases the products and process to properly wash your vehicle, from start to finish, starting with the wheels and tires and finishing with cleaning door jambs.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Factory Five Build Part 1 - the Engine
programme.desc: Kevin and Bryan begin work on a new Factory Five Hot Rod with a Dart 369 engine build

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Factory Five Build Part 2 - the Body
programme.desc: Bryan and Kevin get the body on their Factory Five Hot Rod

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Factory Five Build Part 3 - the Test
programme.desc: Kevin and Bryan finish their five-day Factory Five project and take their car to the streets.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Welding Tips
programme.desc: Learn some Mig and Tig welding tips as the guys finish the roll cage and do some patch panels on the Fuller Hot Rod Project.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - Custom Camaro
programme.desc: How do you a make a 2010 SS throw back Camaro look even better. Drop it off with Kevin and Bryan and see what happens.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - SuperNova
programme.desc: Kevin installs a new wiring harness while Bryan welds up a new exhaust for our Nova.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - See it Made - Magnaflow
programme.desc: Kevin visits Magnaflow to see what it takes to get that perfect sounding exhaust.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage - FEAD System
programme.desc: Kevin and Bryan tear up a motor to see the importance of the serpentine belt.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Time is Not On Their Side
programme.desc: For Dale and Matt sometimes the dotted line to treasure splits and heads in opposite directions. In this edition of What’s in the Barn, time is thrust to the forefront of this multi-state, long distance, north, south search. Timeless and priceless 110 year old bikes, antique cars, airplanes, and the infamous Egberts 1930 neon Harley-Davidson sign that coined the phrase “Ride a Winner” are high on this father and son’s list of “must haves”. The clock ticks, both literally and figuratively, on one rare time piece and two old-timer’s cars, bikes, and automobiles.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Orphan Bikes
programme.desc: Promoters of the prestigious Amelia Island Concours have called on Dale to develop a show and field bikes for an “Orphan Bike” show. They have defined orphan bike as extremely rare, that aren't a Harley nor Indian machines.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Wounded Warrior Project
programme.desc: Home Depot Senior Vice President, Gordon Erickson, is a huge fan of Wheels Through Time. He is also a huge supporter of the Wounded Warrior program. For years the hardware giant has been donating goods and services to help returning servicemen with their fix-it-up projects. Now they would like to go one step further and build a WWII military bike to raise awareness and funds. Only problem is where to get one? Enter Dale and an exhaustive, time sensitive, cross country search for a rare military machine.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Second Time's a Charm
programme.desc: The RM Auction Company has worked with Dale before as a buyer, seller, historian, and caretaker at the prestigious Lee Hartung auction. But this event is no last minute rush to define one man’s treasures. This is a well calculated, time consuming, multi-media, and multi motorcycle and prized art deal.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Vegas Payday
programme.desc: Big Time Motorcycle Auction

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Biker Lore
programme.desc: Built in the mid-60’s by eccentric engineer “Wild Bill” Gelbke, the Road Dog was, and still is, the largest motorcycle ever built. It utilized aircraft tubing, Corvette disc brakes, and a Chevy truck differential to keep it stable. The one-off creation disappeared when Gelbke did in 1978. Outflanked once when the bike was spotted and sold to a private collector in 1995, Dale has vowed to locate the machine and make Wheels Through Time its final resting place.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Don't Tell Dale
programme.desc: Matt is out for revenge. Last year Dale beat him badly at the Annual Vintage bike race in Barber, Alabama. But this year there is a whole new tale to tell. With just days until the race - Dale is secretly struggling to get the bike he beat Matt with last year up and working. Matt struggles just to locate a 100-year old bike. Matt's prayers are answered thanks to an old Catholic Priest he located who has possession of a bike. The priest might let Matt have the bike to race - but there are conditions. The toughest one: Don't tell Dale you have it. Can Matt afford to buy the bike and get it running in time for the race without Dale seeing it? Will Dale even get his broken bike started? And if they ever get to race, will Matt exact his revenge?

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Diamond in Dodge City
programme.desc: An family farm in the mid-west contains houses, barns, outbuildings, trailers, grain silos and buses full of old stuff and perhaps the biggest stash of undiscovered old motorcycles in the country. The collection was put together by their unnamed father. Seller agrees to have Dale broker rare Excelsior for high-end client. Dale has the buyer, but will he outbid his own client for the exclusive find?

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - 12 Hours and Running
programme.desc: “12hrs. & Running”: Dale turns a surprise 60th birthday party into a challenge to his guests to start 120 of the rarest motorcycles in the world.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Hidden Hillclimbers
programme.desc: A cross-country race to lay claim to some of the world’s most sought after works specials.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Peashooter
programme.desc: A vague tip leads Matt and Dale into a WWII era military warehouse and beyond.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Davenport Swap
programme.desc: A thousand bulging barns of choppers, bobbers, and board trackers are emptied and on display in the Quad Cities.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - 100 Year Old Harley
programme.desc: “Yes, Dale there is a 100 Year Old Harley”: Dale hopes his labor of love becomes a prized possession when a six-figure Harley goes to auction.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Motorcycle Crime Story
programme.desc: “A Motorcycle Crime Story”: The horrific tale of a double murder over money and motorcycles.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - The Century Race
programme.desc: “The Century Race”: Dale believes he found the bike that will help him beat a rival in an annual race of 100 year old motorcycles. But will it run?

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Doubling Down
programme.desc: A California collector gambles on a big payday from his Crocker/Caddy combo.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Time is Not On Their Side

And if they ever get to race, will Matt exact his revenge?
