programme.title: Stihl Timbersports
programme.desc: The Rookie World Championship highlighted the sport’s brightest emerging talents on the big stage.

programme.title: Stihl Timbersports
programme.desc: At Toulouse’s stunning Zénith Metropole, the Team World Championship delivered a thrilling finale.

programme.title: Stihl Timbersports
programme.desc: Capping the international calendar, the Individual World Championship delivered a thrilling finale.

programme.title: Stihl Timbersports
programme.desc: From axe to saw, the world’s strongest women deliver TIMBERSPORTS action in Germany.

programme.title: Bentley Flying Spur V8
programme.desc: Bentley downsizes the Flying Spur. With Europe in mind, it is now also available with 8 instead of 12 cylinders, as the extremely thirsty twelve-cylinder doesn't really seem to sell on the continent.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: At the "Day of Thunder" in Magdeburg, Germany, two- and four-wheelers take part in Europe's most famous 1/8 mile race.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: Already in the eighth season of the German Race Wars, visitors from over 20 countries make their pilgrimage to the big event. And: The Mini John Cooper Works is the racing version of the Bavarian racer. Arden turns it into the Arden Mini AM 3.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: For BMW tuner Manhart Racing, the Nurburgring Nordschleife is the ideal place to celebrate its 25th anniversary. As part of the Track Days, customers and interested parties will have the opportunity to get to know the Manhart models.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: Once a year, car tuning fans from all over the country meet at Neue Messe Dresden for the XS CarNight. On 35,000 square metres automotive dreams can be admired there while the lights go out outside.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: Unlike the countless Show & Shine car meetings, at the Rust'n'Roll the older means the better. Only when the vehicles look really old and are as rusty as possible are they considered beautiful.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The NitrolympX is a motor sport event that was first held in Hockenheim in 1986. With about 30,000 spectators and around 300 participants, it is the largest international drag race event in Europe.

programme.title: A tuned Beetle!
programme.desc: It looks like a Volkswagen Beetle from the Seventies. But with contemporary tuning, 90 horse power and 112 mph top speed, it promises unlimited driving pleasure.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The 1971 BMW 02 Touring was considered an ugly duckling at the time, but is now a coveted car. Also: the solid technology and moderate prices of the Mercedes-Benz 114/115 made them the first "people's Mercedes".

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: In the 1950s, companies like Tatra from Czechoslovakia introduced advanced, even pioneering automobiles. The clientele was exclusive, which is why now these streamlined cars are big rarities. We tracked down the owner of a 1937 Tatra T87.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The Porsche 911 Targa with its lightweight construction is an iconic car. Also: the Lotus Seven Twin Cam SS is more pf a race than a road car. And: the 1930 Bentley Blower and the dainty British roadster, the Sunbeam Tiger.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The 1967 Ford Fairlane GTA in NASCAR trim. Also: the 1995 Chrysler 300 C was the most powerful production vehicle in the US. And: the 1949 Cadillac Series 62 convertible set new standards in terms of luxury.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The 1947 Triumph 1800 Roadster provides space for 5 fresh air fans. Also: Le Jog, the toughest classic car rally in Europe. A German women's team takes on the challenge in their VW Iltis. And: a charming oldie, the 1919 Wolseley Stellite.

programme.title: Facel Vega Facellia
programme.desc: In the late 1950s, the Facel Vega Facellia was designed to compete with Porsche and Alfa Romeo and open a new market segment for the fledgling French luxury car company.

programme.title: BMW M3
programme.desc: In the late 80s BMW brought a car onto the market which carried true racing genes. Initially conceived as a homologation model for the German Touring Car Championship, it developed into being one of the world's hottest street sports car. Whenever its name is mentioned, car fans feel goosebumps - even today: the BMW M3.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: British limousines are the embodiment of luxury, they are the automotive upper class. Built with the most exclusive materials, these limousines like the Rolls Royce Phantom, Bentley Mulsanne or Jaguar XJ combine luxury, comfort and power.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: Whether it is the Mercedes S-Class, the BMW 7-series or the Audi A8, limousines "Made in Germany" are considered status symbols, setting standards when it comes to comfort, pioneering technologies and safety.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: International limousines by Rolls Royce, Bentley, Mercedes, BMW and Jaguar guarantee an exclusive appearance and stand for status, prestige and perfection. They are the benchmark when it comes to luxury and comfort.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: Power limousines like the BMW M5, Mercedes-AMG E63, Audi RS6 and Mulsanne Speed offer a unique mix of style, performance and suitability for daily use. They combine the luxury of a limousine with the dynamics of a super sports car.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: They are masterpieces of automotive art, cars of breathtaking elegance, extraordinary performance, built for speeds beyond imagination: Bugatti Chiron, Lykan Hypersports, Pagani Huayra and Ferrari LaFerrari.

programme.title: BMW Kelleners Sport 640i Grand Coupe
programme.desc: The Kelleners Sport 640i is based on one of the most beautiful 4-door coupes. The tuning company of Ralf Kelleners, the son of a three-time European touring car champion, made a name for itself by specializing in remodeling BMWs.

programme.title: Volkswagen Touareg V6 TDI
programme.desc: Volkswagen subjected the Touareg to a radical makeover. After the end of the Phaeton, it's the new luxury top model from VW. Hopes are high: it has to sell big so that management can restore the peoples' confidence in the Volkswagen brand.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Gugu puts the updated Golf GTI through its paces. LDV Expands their local line up with a brand-new SUV. And Zee takes over the Landover defender trophy

programme.title: Buyer's Guide
programme.desc: We assess whether a repaired Subaru Forester is still safe to keep, help a long-time Polo owner decide between a BMW 320d and a Polo Sedan, compare family SUV options at R400 000.

programme.title: IGNITION Goes to SEMA
programme.desc: From a fully reworked BMW with a powerful four-pipe M3 motor to a tiny Renault packing a powerful VR6 engine - Vic brings you all the coolest rides from SEMA 2024.

programme.title: Petrolheads
programme.desc: We’re out in Pretoria checking out the VW vs BMW Parkoff. Sbu chats to motocross prodigy Joshua Mlimi about his incredible career. And Vic profiles the famous Corrupt Mustang.

programme.title: Porsche Techart Grand GT
programme.desc: The Techart Grand GT may look like Darth Vader's private ride, but it's in fact a souped-up version of the Porsche Panamera.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took the Mercedes AMG SLS GT to an airfield and the Porsche 911 Turbo S to the racetrack in order to see these sporty driving machines in action and test their performance. In addition: the Audi R8 4.0 TFSI's innovative lighting technology.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Jaguar found their way back to the world of sports cars. The F-Type doesn't just look good, it's got what it takes, and the car is able to take on the competition like the BMW Z4. We also took a closer look at two other competitors, the Porsche Boxster S and Nissan's 370 Z.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: For more than 60 years the Corvette has been the embodiment of the American sports car. Also: the Ford Mustang GT, an iconic model with a V8 engine at the price of a Volkswagen Passat. And: the Chevrolet Camaro, another classic from the land where cylinder capacity is still valued a lot.

programme.title: Lamborghini Huracan by O.CT
programme.desc: A lot of power thanks to a compressor. This optimized O.CT Lamborghini Huracán delivers over 800 horse power to get the blood flowing.

programme.title: Morgan ARP4
programme.desc: Since 1950, the exhilarating Morgan +4 has been the mainstay of Morgan production. The ARP4 is the latest addition to the +4 family and strictly limited to a run of 50.

programme.title: Beradino
programme.desc: A „bella macchina“, a beautiful car - but not designed by masters like Bertone or Pininfarina. Johannes Paulussen from Neuss in Germany built the Beradino by hand.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: An angry bull, a few Englishmen who prepared themselves for rather unpleasant weather conditions and a young, talented race driver, these were all visitors who ventured to the infamous Green Hell of the Nürburgring.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: A tuned-up Golf 2, a family sedan from Hanover, Germany and a very special Porsche GT2. We looked behind the scenes of the gas station by the curve on the race track where sports cars flock.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: When the Nürburgring transforms into a winter wonderland, it may look pleasant but sure isn't too pleasant as a race track.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: Fog, rain and snow means that a visit to the Eifel region isn't too pleasant. Nevertheless, the toughest drivers were at the track, not letting the weather get in their way.

programme.title: Jaguar XJR
programme.desc: The highlight of the XJR lies beneath the hood: all of Jaguar's top models are equipped with the 5-liter V8 compressor engine that delivers 550 HP in this sports sedan.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: A trend is on the rise: going on mountain cruises in a sports car. As super cars become more comfortable and suitable for travelling in spite of their ever-increasing performance, what would be the perfect sports car for taking on the Alps: the Lamborghini Aventador Miura Homage, the Ferrari 458 Speciale, the McLaren 570S or the Porsche 911 Turbo S?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: To drive or be driven: That is the question for people who can afford such a choice. When it comes to the Bentley Mulsanne with its extended wheelbase, one could be more delighted to sit in the back of the car than in the front. But what is the situation when it comes to the sporty Maserati Quattroporte? Or the upgraded BMW 7 series by Alpina with the model name B7? Or the original, the BMW 750i?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Would you prefer a turbocharged or rather a naturally aspirated engine? With the 7th generation Chevrolet Corvette, buyers were able to choose between either. What's the more convincing model variation, the Grand Sport or Z06? Also: the McLaren 720, with its 4-litre BiTurbo V8. And: taking part in the "Bavaria Sportwagen Tour" with an AMG GTR.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: If you had the choice to select three cars for every occasion, which models would receive a spot in your garage? We took a look at the Rolls Royce Phantom, the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera and the Audi RS4 for this little mindgame.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In 2018, the Audi R8 Quattro Performance received an upgrade. The new version shared some of its aerodynamic features with the Lamborghini Huracan. Also: the Porsche Macan S got a more powerful engine.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The rebirth of French chic: the elegant DS 9 from Citroen's luxury brand. Plus: the Genesis GV80 offers luxury at a low price. And: a test drive in the exorbitantly expensive Mercedes-Benz 300 SL.

programme.title: Saab 93 and Saab 99 Turbo
programme.desc: In 1937 an airplane manufacturing company was founded in Sweden that later became the famous car manufacturer Saab. We present two of their iconic car models, the Saab 93 and 99 Turbo.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Every other year, the Land Rover Experience Tour invites adventurers to explore the world's most remote areas. In 2017, the destination was Peru. Part 1 of 4.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Every other year, the Land Rover Experience Tour invites adventurers to explore the world's most remote areas. In 2017, the destination was Peru. Part 2 of 4.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Every other year, the Land Rover Experience Tour invites adventurers to explore the world's most remote areas. In 2017, the destination was Peru. Part 3 of 4.

programme.title: Motorvision Specials
programme.desc: Every other year, the Land Rover Experience Tour invites adventurers to explore the world's most remote areas. In 2017, the destination was Peru. Part 4 of 4.

programme.title: Mitsubishi Lancer Evo 10
programme.desc: The ice course on Lungauring, the Mitsubishi Lancer Evo 10 in winter training. Twelve participants in six Evos were taught the art of drifting with a four-wheel drive car. We accompanied a student on his first drifting experience.

programme.title: Cadillac Escalade
programme.desc: The Cadillac Escalade at first seems like a typical rather beefy American car, but this luxurious SUV is more of a lovable, gentle giant, that should be able to gain sympathy with its clientele.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: What better way is there to celebrate a stylish and powerful car and a sunny summer day than going for a cruise over the Alps to Italy in a Maserati GranCabrio MC? In addition: a Brit with a fiery temperament, the Jaguar XK-RS convertible with 550 hp. And: Mercedes AMG's SL models, uncompromising performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In a city that loves to show off wealth and luxury, the Dubai police are eager to represent this image via its fleet of patrol cars that includes a Chevrolet Camaro, a Lamborghini Aventador, a Bentley GT, a Ferrari FF, an Aston Martin and a Mercedes SLS. For the first time ever, the Dubai Police Special Cars Unit allowed a television crew to accompany them on their service missions.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Aerodynamics crucially influence the performance, track stability and dynamics of a vehicle. We took the Porsche 911 Turbo S, the BMW M6 convertible and the Kelleners 330d to the test and explored the influence of different wings and spoilers.

programme.title: Audi R8 V10 plus
programme.desc: The second generation of the Audi R8. V10 naturally aspirated engine, up to 610 horsepower and 330 kilometers an hour. A supercar with a lot of character.

programme.title: Audi RS7 Sportback Performance
programme.desc: The Audi RS7 Sportback performance is the spearhead of the Audi 7 series with the acceleration values of a super sports car. But it cannot play to its strengths in hectic urban traffic.

programme.title: Volvo Laplander 6x6
programme.desc: More extremes are always possible. Volvo's Laplander army vehicle has 6 wheels, 3 axles and provides space for at least 12 soldiers.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.desc: Frank Slopianka is a racing junkie and constantly takes part in such events. US car fans Kati and Patrick join him for the Race 61, a rock and race festival in Finowfurt near Berlin. There Frank and and his Dragster Camaro take part in the 1/8 mile race.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.desc: German entrepeneur Tillmann Miritz loves vintage cars and has a dream: driving through the USA in his Mercedes Cabriolet 280 SE 3.5. He drives along the picturesque French Riviera and visits a classic car collector before his 280 gets shipped.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.desc: Tillmann starts his dream journey in New York, the city that never sleeps. With his Mercedes 280 SE convertible he visits the legendary classic car dealer Eliot Cuker who made his fortune with his passion for old cars.

programme.title: Arden AJ23
programme.desc: A Jaguar that is able to terrify the world alone with its roar. This Jaguar F-Type R tuned by Arden is a real bad boy. Already in the series production configuration, the F-Type R Coupe is a dream car that can really bite but this Jaguar which has been upgraded from Arden, now calls itself "AJ23“ and is more powerful, louder and more aggressive than any of his brothers.

programme.title: Jaguar XJR
programme.desc: The highlight of the XJR lies beneath the hood: all of Jaguar's top models are equipped with the 5-liter V8 compressor engine that delivers 550 HP in this sports sedan.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: In this episode we invite you to witness the progress of driver Uwe Nittle as he got ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: The RCN Challenge is the ultimate BMW driving experience. We also paid a visit to the Devils Diner, the track's indoor meeting place for drivers.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: After the 24-hour race was over we left the Nürburgring and moved to Büren, Germany, where the Raeder Motorsport company is based. They are famous for front-wheel drives with a great performance that put a lot of horsepower to the track.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: The roaring sounds of engines and exhausts usually dominate the Nürburgring, but we focused on something a bit quieter this time. How about taking part in a 15 mile bike ride around the ring, or perhaps a 16 mile run?

programme.title: Artega GT
programme.desc: From 2006 to 2012 the German company Artega produced their GT sports car model. Thanks to the know-how of a former Porsche and BMW manager the Artega GT was able to be manufactured in a small series.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: The Pikes Peak Hill Climb is a rather unique type of car race in the mountains of Colorado, USA. It's exciting, tough and dangerous, and in 1987, two-time world rally champion Walter Röhrl took his Audi Sport Quattro S1 to the top.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: In the 1930s the famous Silver Arrows by Auto Union that were designed by Ferdinand Porsche celebrated great successes at the European Drivers' Championship and several Grand Prix races despite the strong competition by Mercedes-Benz.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: The International Championship for Manufacturers was a rally series which was run from 1970 to 1972. Car manufacturers such as Porsche, Renault, Opel and Ford took part in this competition, with Ford having an exceptionally successful year in 1972.

programme.title: Mercedes 300 SL Lightweight
programme.desc: An iconic racing car and one of only 29 ever built! We accompanied the Mercedes 300 SL 'lightweight' on its premiere drive at the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Bentley Mulsanne EWB
programme.desc: The long version of the Bentley Mulsanne is a prime example of a chauffeured limousine. With it, the British luxury car brand has set the bar extremely high when it comes to automotive comfort.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes from the German company Action Concept really let it rip. This time stuntman Paul slides through under an exploding vehicle. At the same time gangster bride Anna flies through the air.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes face a new mission: performing a front-flip through the air with a stuntman behind the wheel of an estate wagon. Stuntmen Daniel and Lars display a brilliant fight choreography in some spectacular driving scenes.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Stuntman Tobi operates an Artega GT at full speed via remote control. This is just a warm-up before the big stunt, in which he drives a car up a steep ramp at 68 mph. The question is: How high can remote-controlled cars fly?

programme.title: Bentley S2 Continental Flying Spur
programme.desc: Flowing lines and an elegance that is unmatched. The 1959 Bentley S2 Continental Flying Spur aims to build bridges in the company's model range. From the sporty origin of the brand to the luxury of its new owner, Rolls Royce.

programme.title: Beradino
programme.desc: A „bella macchina“, a beautiful car - but not designed by masters like Bertone or Pininfarina. Johannes Paulussen from Neuss in Germany built the Beradino by hand.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Since its introduction in 1983 the Opel Combo has been very successful with both craftspeople and families alike. We took a look at the updated version. Also: with the XC40, Volvo introduced a new mobility concept called Care by Volvo.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Porsche packed a lot of power into the Panamera. We took their Sport Turismo model to the Formula One track in Bahrain. In addition: BMW redesigned their 530i Touring 4-cylinder station wagon. And: an trip to Cologne in the Volvo V60.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Beside SUVs, compact and city cars are on the rise. For many people, a Kia Picanto is enough to satisfy their mobility needs. In addition: the Audi A1 offers certain features of the luxury class, but at a much higher price. And: the agile Kia Ceed GT.

programme.title: Toyota MegaCruiser BXD10
programme.desc: The Toyota MegaCruiser BXD10 has its origins in the Japanese army. Its shape won’t win any beauty contests or achieve the best results in the wind tunnel, but this is not really the point with an SUV like this.

programme.title: Cadillac CTS-V
programme.desc: Those who don’t know about it will only see a dignified sedan but under the hood hides the 649 horse power 6.2 liter V8 supercharged engine of the Corvette Z06. This car is a good alternative to the Audi RS6, BMW M5 and Mercedes E63 AMG.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.desc: Kati and Patrick from Munich are no longer satisfied with their 1972 Chevrolet Chevelle's 5.7-liter small block and want to buy a bigger engine. For that reason they visit the engine specialists from Down Town Garage for a proper conversion.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.desc: Paaren/Glien near Berlin is host to the yearly Oldtimer Show. Frank and his crew from Special Cars Berlin take their Dragster Camaro to the airfield where high performance cars battle it out in a 1/8 mile race. Will Frank be able to defy the competition?

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.desc: With more than 500 featured super sports cars by Lamborghini, Ferrari, Bugatti or Koenigsegg, Germany is home to the world's largest Supercar Rallye. US car fans Kati and her husband Patrick take part in this event with a brand new Chevrolet Camaro.

programme.title: Bentley Mulsanne EWB
programme.desc: The long version of the Bentley Mulsanne is a prime example of a chauffeured limousine. With it, the British luxury car brand has set the bar extremely high when it comes to automotive comfort.

programme.title: Porsche Ruf RT35
programme.desc: Ruf RT35 may look like a Porsche, but it really isn't. Since 1981, the Ruf company in Pfaffhausen, Germany, has been recognized as an independent manufacturer. But the basis for its vehicles comes exclusively from Porsche. A Ruf is even faster and more exclusive than a comparable Porsche.

programme.title: Aston Martin Rapide S
programme.desc: Aston Martin is breaking new ground with the sport sedan – the „Rapide S“. Ever since the official car of James Bond became the Aston Martin, this brand has achieved cult status. Desirable, timelessly elegant, 2-door sports coupes are the DNA. But even the venerable British brand does not escape evolution - because with the Rapide S, Aston Martin goes new ways.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Jaguar company founder Sir William Lyons built his first automobile in 1931. Only a few years later, the Jaguar SS 100 appeared, a sports car that was superior to all others. Since then, every Jaguar has fascinated with its power, dynamics and elegance.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: From the very beginning, Jaguar's sports and racing cars have been tailor-made for top speeds. Whether Le Mans, Daytona or the Monte Carlo Rally, Jaguar dominated and shaped international motorsport for many years.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The history of Volkswagen begins in 1936 with the Beetle. The iconic small car becomes a propaganda object, a million-seller and a film star. But Volkswagen was almost too late in building a modern successor, and the company went into crisis. Part 1 of 2.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: At the beginning of the 1970s, Volkswagen is in crisis. The company has no answer to the oil crisis and no successor to the Beetle. It was only with the new generation Passat and Golf cars that Volkswagen returned to the fast lane. Part 2 of 2.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Whether with their rocket vehicles or their Ascona or Calibra car models, racing has been closely associated with the Opel brand for over 100 years. Just two years after the start of car production, the first Opel won a race in 1901.

programme.title: Historic Formula V
programme.desc: In the late fifties in America, the first Formula V racers were produced. The goal: Affordable motor sport for everyone. The small, open wheel cars were seen on the race tracks until the end of the 70s. Then the series was stopped. About 20 years ago a couple of Formula V owners came together and established the "Historic Formula V Europe" as an association.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 1 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 2 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 3 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 4 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 5 of 5)

programme.title: Harley-Davidson Trio
programme.desc: We took a look at three very different Harley-Davidson models. The versatile Switchback Dyna, the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, and the bad-boy motorcycle Softail Slim.

programme.title: KTM 990 Adventure
programme.desc: It's very big and mostly comes in orange: the KTM 990 Adventure. Over rough terrain it's often driven standing up. Today, the 990 is considered the off-road specialist among travel Enduros.

programme.title: Facel Vega Facellia
programme.desc: In the late 1950s, the Facel Vega Facellia was designed to compete with Porsche and Alfa Romeo and open a new market segment for the fledgling French luxury car company.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: A vehicle jumps at full speed over four cars, which explode one after the other. It’s a matter of precision and timing for the Stunt Heroes. Also, up-and-coming stuntwoman Tina has to prove her skills.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The team is shooting a car rollover. Stunt coordinator Carl wants to go all out. He adds an exciting shootout to the mix. Also, he has a surprise for his boss. During the rollover he wants him to sit in the passenger seat, for the very first time.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA) - NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech
programme.desc: NCPA Round of 32: San Diego State University vs. Utah Tech University

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 - US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Oncins/Jardim vs. Miscik/Domoracki
programme.desc: Get ready for an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match featuring the formidable team of Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim against the new pairing of Ryan Miscik and Christie Domoracki. Oncins is a former professional tennis player from Brazil. His partner, Simone Jardim, is a professional pickleball player, a Pickleball Hall of Fame inductee, and was once ranked the number one female player in the world. They face a new team with Ryan Miscik, a pro pickleball player and coach based in Venice, Florida. His partner, Christie Domoracki, is a player located in Boca Grande, Florida. This match brings together a mix of experienced pros and up-and-coming talent for a high-stakes competition on Florida's Paradise Coast.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Picklebowl 2023 - Mens Doubles 2
programme.desc: Pickleball star Ryan Sherry & former NFL linebacker Brandon Siler vs. pickleball star Lew Halski & former NFL linebacker David Pollack.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
programme.desc: Kyle Yates & Andrei Daescu take on twin brothers Hunter Johnson & Yates Johnson for Gold

programme.title: NPL - NPL - Stingers vs Hammers Team (Mixed)
programme.desc: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Houston Hammers in a mixed team match.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - November 7, 2023 - AZ PBL
programme.desc: In this fun night of Tuesday Night Pickleball, the Scottsdale Scorchers go up against the Surprise Stingers!

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Split Doubles - Semifinal
programme.desc: Senior Pro’s Andre Mick & Jose Derisi battles against Altaf Merchant & John Cincola at the Naples, Florida.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal
programme.desc: Watch Nathalie Bagby and Beth Bellamy compete against Eva Welsher and Angela Simon for the gold in this Women's Senior Pro Doubles Gold Medal match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Singles - Gold
programme.desc: Watch Jennifer Dawson battle it out for gold against Leslie Bernard in this Women's Senior Pro Singles match at the US Open Pickleball Championships 2023.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA) - NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah
programme.desc: NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs University of Utah in the 2025 NCPA Championships from Las Vegas.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 2
programme.desc: Pickleball star JW Johnson & pro football player Marcellus Wiley team up against pro-pickler Jorja Johnson & film director and producer John Brenkus.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Picklebowl 2023 - Mens Doubles 3
programme.desc: Kyle Yates & Picklebowl host Danny Wuerffel are up against pro-pickleball star Rob Nunnery & American Idol singer Phillip Phillips.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
programme.desc: The World Pickleball League Season 2 returns to the Jio World Garden in Mumbai for an electrifying Tie 8 showdown. The defending champions, Bengaluru Jawans—led by coach Oliver Strecker and backed by owners Atlee and Priya—return to the court for the first time since their dominant opening night performance. They face a determined Delhi Dilwale squad, coached by Wesley Gabrielsson, who are looking to climb the standings after a hard-fought tie-break victory in their previous outing.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - Tuesday Night Pickleball - December 13 2022 - All Stars Mixed Doubles
programme.desc: December 13, 2022 - Live from The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health, it's Tuesday Night Pickleball

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal - S01E40
programme.desc: Anna Leigh Waters and James Johnson take on Jorja Johnson and Gabriel Tardio in this Mixed Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
programme.desc: Witness an intense showdown in Day 3, Tie 2 of the World Pickleball League Season 2 as the Chennai Super Champs face off against the home favorites, Mumbai Pickle Power, at the Jio World Garden. This episode features a mix of elite athleticism and star-studded entertainment, starting with a special appearance by legendary Bollywood choreographer Bosco Martis, who discusses the rhythmic similarities between dance and pickleball.

programme.title: World Pickleball Open 2023 - World Pickleball Open 2023
programme.desc: November 16 - 18, 2023 at Palm Beach Gardens Tennis & Pickleball Center, all levels of players competed in the World Pickleball Open 2023!

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2
programme.desc: The high-stakes action of Day 7 in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) features a decisive matchup between Pune United and the Delhi Dilwale. With the semi-final race tightening, both teams are fighting fiercely for vital points.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
programme.desc: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
programme.desc: The penultimate day of World Pickleball League Season 2 heats up at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden with a high-stakes rematch of last year's semifinals between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru Jawans. The spotlight shines on a "mouthwatering" women's singles clash between two unbeaten titans, Shawn Mendes and Katerina Stewart, where one historic winning streak is destined to end. From tactical mixed doubles experiments to the high-pressure debut of Eduardo Irizarry, every point is a desperate fight to stay "in the hunt" for a final spot. With commentators on the "edge of their seats" witnessing unbelievable defensive plays and "blistering" side outs, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA) - NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
programme.desc: A high-level pickleball match from the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional as the Utah Tech collegiate program's top two teams battle head-to-head. Filmed live at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah, this episode features the Women's Doubles showdown between the #2 seed Utah Tech 1, featuring Lauren Mercado and Ella Boydston, against the #3 seed Utah Tech 2, anchored by NCPA commentator Dillon Champigny and rising star Mary Monson. Experience the intense collegiate format, which includes singles, doubles, and mixed doubles, a design optimized based on direct player feedback.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1
programme.desc: It's a "Terrific Tuesday" at the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Day 5 features a critical matchup between the Bengaluru Jawans and the Delhi Dilwale. The stakes are high: Delhi, currently number five on the points table, has a chance to move to number three if the results go their way, while Bengaluru looks to bounce back from a recent loss.

programme.title: The PressBox Party - The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
programme.desc: With Ray Colaiacovo sitting in for Tim Ring, Dave Benz talks about the growing craze of pickleball and how Pickleball first arrived to the masses on national TV via the US Open Pickleball Championship.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
programme.desc: Dylan Frazier and Ritchie Tuazon meet Irina Tereschenko and Connor Pardoe in a high-stakes mixed doubles match at Picklebowl 2023. Set against the backdrop of this annual charity event, the match features four seasoned competitors known for their precision, quick reflexes, and court awareness. Expect fast-paced exchanges, smart teamwork, and big momentum swings as both teams battle for bragging rights and a good cause. Blending professional play with the spirited energy of Picklebowl, this match is a crowd favorite you won’t want to miss.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos
programme.desc: In this high-stakes Bronze Medal match at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, veteran competitors Jenny Klitch and Sheri Courter go head-to-head with Ellen Novoseletsky and Jenny Marcos. Expect calculated teamwork, steady hands, and sharp strategy as these seasoned senior pros compete for a podium finish. Filmed live from Naples, Florida, this match showcases the competitive spirit and skill that define senior pro pickleball.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA) - NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
programme.desc: Live from Virginia Beach, this Round of 16 matchup from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Penn State battling Liberty University for a spot in the quarterfinals. With a bid to the National Championship on the line, the stakes are incredibly high in this win-or-go-home match.The contest goes the distance, pushing both teams to their limits. After splitting the initial six games 3-3, the match culminates in a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7). Watch standout performances from Liberty's John McCutcheon and Anneliese Brielle, who fight to keep their team alive, and Penn State's Caitlin Hartman and Theodore De Sousa, who deliver clutch plays under pressure.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1
programme.desc: The stakes reach their absolute peak at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden for the first semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2, where there are "no do overs" for the Chennai Super Champs and Pune United. Witness a high-stakes tactical chess match as Chennai’s coach Jonny Goldberg makes the bold move to start premier player Rika Fujiwara against the "big and aggressive" Katie Morris in a critical women's singles clash. The intensity continues with a masterclass in mixed doubles featuring the powerful pairing of Lee Hwang Nam and Carlota Trevino facing off against Pune's consistent stars, William Sobeck and Magdalena Gregorio. Every point is a desperate grind for survival as these two titans battle through "world class" rallies for a guaranteed spot in the grand finale.

programme.title: The Wager - Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
programme.desc: Set at the scenic Troubadour Golf and Field Club in Nashville, TN, this exhibition match brings a mix of celebrity flair and friendly competition to the pickleball court. Olympian Shawn Johnson and her husband Andrew East take on TV host Jason Kennedy and pro Wes Burrows in a lighthearted yet tightly contested match that goes down to the wire. With Shawn still learning the ropes (and the rules), and Andrew channeling his athletic instincts, the duo puts up an impressive fight against the more experienced Kennedy and Burrows. It’s a fast-paced, fun-filled match full of laughs, learning moments, and great rallies—perfect for fans of lifestyle sports and celebrity matchups.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA) - NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
programme.desc: Live from the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, watch a thrilling collegiate pickleball battle between Purdue University and Creighton University. Tied at 2-2 entering the broadcast, this match features intense mixed doubles action that decides the series.Key matchups include Purdue’s Emma Jones and Jay Barath facing off against Creighton’s Russell Lee and Lucy. Later, Purdue’s Caleb Young and Tammy Lamb take on Creighton’s Noah Wodzinski and Elizabeth Cook.

The winner of this pool play match gains a strong position for seeding, moving closer to securing one of the National Championship bids.

From game-changing "Pickle Plays" to high-stakes challenges and the presence of celebrity guests like Rishabh Pant, every rally in this tie is a desperate fight for survival on the road to the semifinals.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 - US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
programme.desc: The match features the second-seeded team of Anna Leigh Waters, the world's number one ranked women's player and a Triple Crown winner, and Andre Agassi, an eight-time Grand Slam tennis champion making his pro pickleball debut. They face the young team of Stevie Petruleas (13 years old) and Tristan Dassault (16 years old), who are playing in only their third tournament together and are looking to make their mark against the seasoned pros. The match highlights key plays, including Agassi's powerful two-handed backhand and Waters' quickness at the kitchen line, and showcases the dynamic between these experienced and rising stars in the sport.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship - Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
programme.desc: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the Senior Women's Doubles Final under the floodlights . Team England, represented by Kirsty Gray and Anna Linton, faces off against Team Spain's Monica Ramirez and Araceli Senciales .After a strong start where England establishes an early lead, the match tightens as Spain finds their rhythm in the second game . Witness the strategic battle as Gray utilizes precision lobs to disrupt the Spanish defense , while Linton delivers powerful drives to secure critical points . In a high-stakes contest for the gold medal, England targets their opponents' positioning to close out the championship .

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
programme.desc: Witness a high-stakes showdown on the final day of league competition as the undefeated Chennai Super Champs face off against a determined Pune United squad in a battle for postseason momentum. As Pune fights to stay alive in the tie, coach Rusty Sobeck looks for a breakthrough in a tactical mixed doubles clash against Jonny Goldberg’s top-tier rotation. From "stunning singles fight backs" to a strategic masterclass in doubles positioning, this tie showcases the intense grit required to challenge the league's only unbeaten titan.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship - Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
programme.desc: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship - Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Their opponents are Peichuan Kao, a professional pickleball player who won gold at the APP Fort Lauderdale Open, and Jack Munro, a young pro who was the youngest to become a professional at age 12.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2
programme.desc: The World Pickleball League (WPBL) continues on Day 5 at the CCI Brabourne Stadium with a clash between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Chennai Super Champs.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1 + Bollywood Exhibition Match
programme.desc: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial tie between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs. The commentary team sets the stage for a tense match, which is determined by an incredibly close final scoreline and points difference, with all six teams still in the running for the four semi-final spots. Also witness the Exhibition Match of the Century featuring Bollywood superstars Aamir Ali (Team Aamir) and Ali Fazal (Team Ali), live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
programme.desc: It's the "Southern Derby" in the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Bengaluru takes on Chennai in the second tie of the day, live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The match features 48 players from six teams and 14 countries, with commentators detailing every crucial point.The tie begins with a thrilling Men's Singles match: Bengaluru's Blaskowitz (a Croatian talent) faces Chennai's Sobek (the Polish national champion). The commentators highlight the extreme patience and dinking skills demonstrated by both players, with Sobek's ability to keep the ball low being a key factor.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
programme.desc: In this thrilling gold medal match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Dylan Frazier and Altaf Merchant take on defending champions Andrei Daescu and Dave Weinbach in the Men’s Split Pro Doubles division. The action heats up fast as Frazier and Merchant dominate early, only to be met with a fierce comeback from Daescu and Weinbach in game two. Momentum swings, net-cord drama, and tactical shifts lead to an electrifying third game where every point counts.From Frazier’s lightning-fast hands to Daescu’s towering net play, this match showcases elite shot-making, sharp strategy, and high emotion on Championship Court. With the crowd on edge and the gold medal on the line, it’s a true masterclass in professional pickleball.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
programme.desc: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Quarterfinal
programme.desc: Lee Whitwell and Andrei Daescu take on Patrick Cote and Susannah Barr in this Mixed Pro Split Age Quarterfinal.

programme.title: Pickleball England - English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
programme.desc: Catch the final showdown from the 2023 English Nationals as Mollie Kubrick-Finney and Thaddea Lock challenge reigning champs Antonella Giuliano and Pei Chun Kao. Featuring sharp angles, aggressive volleys, and expert analysis, this match crowns the best in British women’s doubles.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
programme.desc: Witness a high-stakes showdown on the final day of league competition as the undefeated Chennai Super Champs face off against a determined Pune United squad in a battle for postseason momentum. The atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden is electric, featuring a "lip-smacking" women's singles battle between European stars Katie Morris and Dominika Turkovic. As Pune fights to stay alive in the tie, coach Rusty Sobeck looks for a breakthrough in a tactical mixed doubles clash against Jonny Goldberg’s top-tier rotation. From "stunning singles fight backs" to a strategic masterclass in doubles positioning, this tie showcases the intense grit required to challenge the league's only unbeaten titan.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship - Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
programme.desc: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 3 - Poker Night In America

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 4 - Poker Night In America

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 8 - Poker Night In America

programme.title: Studio 52 - Episode 9 - Poker Night In America

programme.title: WPT Festa al Lago - Part 1

programme.title: WPT Festa al Lago - Part 2

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 481 - Dream Boxing 14 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dream Boxing 14 part 1 from Riga, Latvia. First up Miks Berzins takes on Aleksandrs Sidorans for a heavyweight bout. The next matchup is betweeen Mika Bigvava from Georgia and Bohdan Sobol from Latvia with 18 wins and only one loss. In the ffinal match, Aleksis Volkovics, making his pro-debut, and Igor Trosins, both Latvian, take to the ring.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 418 - Country Box 29
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Jimmy Adams Promotions, Country Box "Where Music Meets Boxing" from Nashville at the famous Troubadour venue. In this episode of Country Box 29, Raquan Ashby faces Ryan Diaz and Oliver Mcall is back at age 59, with 39 KO's the former WBC heavyweight champion (knocking out Lennox Lewis) takes on Gary Cobia. In the main event, the more experienced Vaughn Alexander tests the undefeated Maidel Sando. Plus singer Krista Dudley plays an original song.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 420 - Dynamite Fighting Show 25 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dynamite Fighting Show 25 part 1 from Oradea, Romania. Starting in the heavyweight division, Remus Bortea is matched up against Vasile Corcodel whose three wins are all by KO. In a Superfight middleweight division bout, Darius Argyo takes on Andrei "The Bonecrusher" Varga in what's expected to be a fast paced bout. Also in this episode is Brazil versus Romania with two very experienced fighters, Rodrigo Mineiro takes on Claudio "The Prince" Badoi in an open weight division fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 471 - Shamrock FC 370 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock FC 370 part 1 from Ameristar Casino in Missouri. In the first match, Gabe Sestan steps into the cage with Adam Cook followed by Reggie Morris versus Jackson Blankenship. Also on the card Ian Houston takes on Garrenn Lucas in the catchweight division plus Shaine Moffitt versus Kody McGehee in a lightweight bout. In the co-main event, Austin Miller, a kickboxer crosses over to MMA taking on Michael Banks.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 371 - KOK Best Of Part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents the Best of King of Kings part 2. In a boxing match Naglis Tamasevicius faces Juris Zundovskis. In a clash of the titans, heavyweight Martin Pacas is matched up against Turkey's Kadir Yildirim "The Terminator." Farshad Derekeh of the Netherlands and Latvian Reinis Porozovs take to the ring in a boxing bout and Beka Gabisonia faces Farruh Gafurov in the Mega Series.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 423 - Shamrock FC 360
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock FC 360 from St. Louis. In tonight's episode, Vince Eazelle and John Long, making his pro debut, step into the cage for a kickboxing match and Billy Duncan faces Jamison Hartweger in a Welterweight division bout. In the co-main event UFC veterans Darian Weeks and Donovan Beard faceoff in the cage and in the main event Jake Collier, UFC veteran, and Christian Edwards, Bellator veteran, are set to meet the challenge in the Light Heavyweight division.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 424 - KOK 122 Riga
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents KOK 122 from Riga, Latvia. In the first matchup Piotr Cybulski and Aleksandrs Zeleznakovs head to the ring for what's expected to be an intense kickboxing bout. Also in this episode Savvas Kagkelidis and Ilija Ivanov faceoff and in a Light Heavyweight bout Jan Pelak and Kristaps Zile step into the ring for a bout under boxing rules. In another Light Heavyweight matchup Deniss Jermakovs takes on Kristaps Zutis in a rapper versus fighter in an MMA contest. In the main event Rodrigo Mineiro and Zaurs Dzavadovs battle for the Interim Welterweight Championship belt.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 414 - Shamrock FC 358
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock Fighting Championship 358 fromKansas City. Starting off, in the Bantamweight division, Corey Leonard challenges hometown favorite Anthony Dooley. Meanwhile Justin Andrews and Logan Blow head to the cage and Tyler Collings takes on Diego Huerta in the light heavyweight division. Also watch as Mason Pillow and Tyler Smith square off in a Catchweight contest and Glendal Whitney faces Carl Jefferson. In the co-main event, undefeated Tyson Hicks takes on veteran Jamese Taylor. In the main event Eric Grant faces Cjay Hunter in a highly anticipated rematch of striker versus grappler.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 471 - Shamrock FC 370 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock FC 370 part 1 from Ameristar Casino in Missouri. In the first match, Gabe Sestan steps into the cage with Adam Cook followed by Reggie Morris versus Jackson Blankenship. Also on the card Ian Houston takes on Garrenn Lucas in the catchweight division plus Shaine Moffitt versus Kody McGehee in a lightweight bout. In the co-main event, Austin Miller, a kickboxer crosses over to MMA taking on Michael Banks.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 481 - Dream Boxing 14 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dream Boxing 14 part 1 from Riga, Latvia. First up Miks Berzins takes on Aleksandrs Sidorans for a heavyweight bout. The next matchup is betweeen Mika Bigvava from Georgia and Bohdan Sobol from Latvia with 18 wins and only one loss. In the ffinal match, Aleksis Volkovics, making his pro-debut, and Igor Trosins, both Latvian, take to the ring.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 418 - Country Box 29
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Jimmy Adams Promotions, Country Box "Where Music Meets Boxing" from Nashville at the famous Troubadour venue. In this episode of Country Box 29, Raquan Ashby faces Ryan Diaz and Oliver Mcall is back at age 59, with 39 KO's the former WBC heavyweight champion (knocking out Lennox Lewis) takes on Gary Cobia. In the main event, the more experienced Vaughn Alexander tests the undefeated Maidel Sando. Plus singer Krista Dudley plays an original song.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 420 - Dynamite Fighting Show 25 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dynamite Fighting Show 25 part 1 from Oradea, Romania. Starting in the heavyweight division, Remus Bortea is matched up against Vasile Corcodel whose three wins are all by KO. In a Superfight middleweight division bout, Darius Argyo takes on Andrei "The Bonecrusher" Varga in what's expected to be a fast paced bout. Also in this episode is Brazil versus Romania with two very experienced fighters, Rodrigo Mineiro takes on Claudio "The Prince" Badoi in an open weight division fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 393 - Centurion FC 19 Part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Centurion Fighting Championships 19 part 1 from Rio de Janeiro. First up Darlan Santos takes on Junior "The Golden Boy" Dias in an intense matchup with contrasting styles. In a dynamic clash, Helio "Big Boy" Nunes, known for his aggressive style and strong finishing abilities, takes on Rafael Silva, who will rely on his stand-up striking skills in a dynamic clash. Expect an intense, high-energy bout between two rising Brazilian fighter as Milson Castro Barao faces William Lima Malvadeza in the first Grand Prix semi-final fight. In the Grand Prix semi-final 2 Walber Dos Anjos Timoteo faces Paulo Henrique Laia in what should be a well-rounded and technical fight followed by the Grand Prix final match.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 415 - Red Owl XIII part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Red Owl BoxFest XIIi part 1 from The Owl's Nest in Houston. In this episode Bre'yon Gorham (17-0) takes on Alan Ayala (11-4) each with a heafty number of knockouts in this Houston versus Guadalajara matchup. In the main event returning fighter Oscar Perez steps into the ring with Christian Medina for 8 rounds of boxing.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 419 - Red Owl BoxFest XIII part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Red Owl BoxFest XIII part 2 from The Owl's Nest in Houston. Up first, Troy Nash with two wins under his belt steps into the ring with David De Leon making his pro debut. In the main event, Marquis Taylor with a reach advantage takes on the taller Ivan Pandzic.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 416 - Bare Knuckle Boxing 39 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Bare Knuckle Boxing 39 part 1 from London. Watch as two veteran bare knuckle fighters Liam Wilson and Jonny Lawson step into the ring. Also on the card Ash Williams versus Joe Fitzpatrick in a British Titile Eliminator bout and Reece Murray versus Adam Grogan in a Bantamweight Title clash plus Ryan Barrett and Richard Samuels throwdown for the British Supermiddleweight crown.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 417 - Bare Knuckle Boxing 39 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Bare Knuckle Boxing 39 part 2 from London.First up in female bout Sweden's Mathilda Wilson faces Romania's Maria Nitescu for a rematch in a Title clash. Next up Carl Hobley and Dan Podmore step into the ring with a World Cruiserweight Title on the line. In the main event Scott McHugh and Aaron McCallum vye for the World Bantamweight Title belt.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 421 - Dynamite Fighting Show 25 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dynamite Fighting Show 25 part 2 from Oradea, Romania. In the Super Middleweight division Steven Mendes from France takes on Romania's more experienced Andrei Ostrovanu with 42 wins (24 by KO). In an ISKA Cruiserweight World Title match, Vasileios Karagkiozis and Sebastian Lutanic vie for the belt in a Greece versus Romania bout. Also, in an open weight division Tolea Ciumac and Bogdan Nastase face off in a David versus Goliath match

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 422 - Dynamite Fighting Show 25 part 3
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dynamite Fighting Show 25 part 3 from Oradea, Romania. Up first in an ISKA Super Middleweight World Title match, Vinicius Bereta of Brazil takes on Adrian Maxim of Romania with the belt on the line. In the Colossal Division with a total of 723 pounds in the ring, Cristian Anheliuc and Sandu Lungu face off. The ISKA Super Middleweight Wordl title is on the line when Camaroon's Brice Kombou takes on Romania's Andrei Leustean.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 459 - Real Fight Promotion 100
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Real Fight Promotion 100 from Ukraine. In this special centenial event RFP brings its viewers an exciting night of fights. First up Stanislav Bogush and Nazar Pryshliak faceoff in the flyweight division followed by Timofiy Mytkalyk versus Ruslan Danyliuk. Also Vyacheslav Vaseichuk and Andriy Dzioba square off. In the Grand Prix finals, the two remaing fighters Roman Bandrivchak and Stanislov Bogush vye for the championship.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 446 - CMH Boxing I part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents CMH Boxing I part 1. In this initial episode of Championing Mental Health Boxing, Marlen Avila faces the young and undefeated Poison Ivy Enriquez. Watch as Jose Ramirez steps into the ring with Jessie Mandapat looking for an upset. Also on this card, promising up and comer Jonny "Magic" Mansour is matched up against Christian Avalos who looks to end Jonny's undefeated streak.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 452 - CMH Boxing I part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents CMH Boxing I part 2 from the Avalon in Hollywood. In the women's division, Brook Sibrian of California takes on the younger Rubi Gutierriz out of Mexico. In the co-main event, Victor Pisillas is set to meet the challenge with Carlos Jackson in a crossroads fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 447 - Up Next Fighting 13 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting 13 part 1 from the Commerce Hotel and Casino in Southern California. First up, striker Bryen Dao takes on brawler Ferrin Marcelin in the featherweight division and Aiden Ingram steps into the cage with Steve Mora in a bantamweight bout. Also on this card Carlos Figueroa looks to break Artem Afanasenko's undefeated streak. In the main event, Christopher "Taco" Padilla puts his lightweight title on the line when he faces his toughest opponent yet with five time UFC veteran Justin Janyes.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 451 - Up Next Fighting 13 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting 13 part 2 from the Commerce Hotel and Casino in Southern California. Starting off in the bantamweight division, Jonathan Powell steps into the cage with veteran grappler Will Holguin. In a featherweight bout, striker Jonny O'Neill takes on wrestler Eudardo Zarate with the winner moving on to a title opportunity. Also watch as Adam Garcia and Zachary Kraschinsky take to the ring in a lightweight bout. With two titles on the line in the featured bout, the rising star UNF Featherweight title and the California State featherweight title in the rising stars division, Stone Lavelle and his opponient Sean Crenshaw battle it out for the two belts.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 448 - Shamrock FC 365
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock FC 365 from Ameristar Hotel and Casio in Missouri. Starting off the night, Amelia Daughtry faces Lucy Hoyt, while Kody Mcgehee steps into the cage with Mike Banks. In the main event UFC veteran Dustin "Scrappy" Lampros takes on BJJ blackbelt Steven "Golden" Graham.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 444 - Fightbook Presents: The Butterfly Brawl part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents The Butterfly Brawl part 1 brought to you by Fightbook from the stunning backdrop of The Santa Monica Pier. This charity boxing event brings together elite fighters and the electric energy of the coast in support of the American Cancer Society. In this first episode Julio Tanori from Mexico steps into the ring after a two year haitus with the young Jason "Dynamite" Robledo from California. Also watch as undefeated Isaiah Carr faces the Philllipines' Daniel Lim. In the middleweight division Poland's Eryk Apresyan faces Terrell "The Sharpshooter" Adams.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 449 - Fightbook Presents: The Butterfly Brawl part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents The Butterfly Brawl part 1 brought to you by Fightbook from the stunning backdrop of The Santa Monica Pier. This charity boxing event brings together elite fighters and the electric energy of the coast in support of the American Cancer Society. In part two, starting off with the co-main event Vlad "Superbad" Panin 21-2 steps into the ring with John Vincent Moralde from the Phillipines. Next up, Brandon Mendoza faces Deni Davtian and topping off the night, the main event features a women's matchup with the hometown favorite and rising star Chantel Navarro taking on two time world champion Nancy Franco.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 450 - DMG Boxing presents Night of Champions IV part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents DMG Boxing Night of Champions IV part 1 from The Fox Theater in Pomona, Califorinia. Starting off the night, Adan Gonzales out of Denver takes to the ring in a southpaw matchup with Dedrick Crocklem of Seattle with a 3-0 record. Also on this card, Samuel Isak takes on Chris Pacheco making his pro-debut. Watch as veteran boxer Vaughn Alexander returns to the DMG ring from St. Louis to take on unstoppable Ruben Cazales with a record of 12-0 and 11 KO's in a super middleweight battle.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 453 - DMG Boxing presents Night of Champions IV part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents DMG Boxing Night of Champions IV part 2 from The Fox Theater in Pomona, California. Starting off with a female bout, undefeated fighters Olympian Brianda Cruz and Susana Lopez step into the ring to fight for their perfect record. In the main event is another battle of the undefeated as David Romero takes on Pedro Valencia who is coming off of a three year hiatus.

programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents The Butterfly Brawl part 1 brought to you by Fightbook from the stunning backdrop of The Santa Monica Pier. This charity boxing event brings together elite fighters and the electric energy of the coast in support of the American Cancer Society. In this first episode Julio Tanori from Mexico steps into the ring after a two year haitus with the young Jason "Dynamite" Robledo from California. Also watch as undefeated Isaiah Carr faces the Philllipines' Daniel Lim. In the middleweight division Poland's Eryk Apresyan faces Terrell "The Sharpshooter" Adams.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 449 - Fightbook Presents: The Butterfly Brawl part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents The Butterfly Brawl part 1 brought to you by Fightbook from the stunning backdrop of The Santa Monica Pier. This charity boxing event brings together elite fighters and the electric energy of the coast in support of the American Cancer Society. In part two, starting off with the co-main event Vlad "Superbad" Panin 21-2 steps into the ring with John Vincent Moralde from the Phillipines. Next up, Brandon Mendoza faces Deni Davtian and topping off the night, the main event features a women's matchup with the hometown favorite and rising star Chantel Navarro taking on two time world champion Nancy Franco.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 450 - DMG Boxing presents Night of Champions IV part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents DMG Boxing Night of Champions IV part 1 from The Fox Theater in Pomona, Califorinia. Starting off the night, Adan Gonzales out of Denver takes to the ring in a southpaw matchup with Dedrick Crocklem of Seattle with a 3-0 record. Also on this card, Samuel Isak takes on Chris Pacheco making his pro-debut. Watch as veteran boxer Vaughn Alexander returns to the DMG ring from St. Louis to take on unstoppable Ruben Cazales with a record of 12-0 and 11 KO's in a super middleweight battle.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 453 - DMG Boxing presents Night of Champions IV part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents DMG Boxing Night of Champions IV part 2 from The Fox Theater in Pomona, California. Starting off with a female bout, undefeated fighters Olympian Brianda Cruz and Susana Lopez step into the ring to fight for their perfect record. In the main event is another battle of the undefeated as David Romero takes on Pedro Valencia who is coming off of a three year hiatus.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 446 - CMH Boxing I part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents CMH Boxing I part 1. In this initial episode of Championing Mental Health Boxing, Marlen Avila faces the young and undefeated Poison Ivy Enriquez. Watch as Jose Ramirez steps into the ring with Jessie Mandapat looking for an upset. Also on this card, promising up and comer Jonny "Magic" Mansour is matched up against Christian Avalos who looks to end Jonny's undefeated streak.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 452 - CMH Boxing I part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents CMH Boxing I part 2 from the Avalon in Hollywood. In the women's division, Brook Sibrian of California takes on the younger Rubi Gutierriz out of Mexico. In the co-main event, Victor Pisillas is set to meet the challenge with Carlos Jackson in a crossroads fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 447 - Up Next Fighting 13 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting 13 part 1 from the Commerce Hotel and Casino in Southern California. First up, striker Bryen Dao takes on brawler Ferrin Marcelin in the featherweight division and Aiden Ingram steps into the cage with Steve Mora in a bantamweight bout. Also on this card Carlos Figueroa looks to break Artem Afanasenko's undefeated streak. In the main event, Christopher "Taco" Padilla puts his lightweight title on the line when he faces his toughest opponent yet with five time UFC veteran Justin Janyes.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 451 - Up Next Fighting 13 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting 13 part 2 from the Commerce Hotel and Casino in Southern California. Starting off in the bantamweight division, Jonathan Powell steps into the cage with veteran grappler Will Holguin. In a featherweight bout, striker Jonny O'Neill takes on wrestler Eudardo Zarate with the winner moving on to a title opportunity. Also watch as Adam Garcia and Zachary Kraschinsky take to the ring in a lightweight bout. With two titles on the line in the featured bout, the rising star UNF Featherweight title and the California State featherweight title in the rising stars division, Stone Lavelle and his opponient Sean Crenshaw battle it out for the two belts.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 448 - Shamrock FC 365
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock FC 365 from Ameristar Hotel and Casio in Missouri. Starting off the night, Amelia Daughtry faces Lucy Hoyt, while Kody Mcgehee steps into the cage with Mike Banks. In the main event UFC veteran Dustin "Scrappy" Lampros takes on BJJ blackbelt Steven "Golden" Graham.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 444 - Fightbook Presents: The Butterfly Brawl part 1

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 443 - Clan Wars 52 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Clan Wars 52 part 1 from Belfast, Ireland. In this episode Conor McDermott faces Callum Carville in the light heavyweight division and in a female bout, Caitlyn Dunne takes on Gemma Coghill. Also in a featherweight match Cesar Correia steps into the cage with Omar Al Haj while Tristan Barnett and Nicolae Schiopu battle it out in the welterweight division. The main event is a featherweight title fight between Michael Cartmill and Nathan Chambers.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 455 - Clan Wars 52 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Clan Wars 52 part 2 from Belfast, Ireland. In this episode Nick Rebreanu faces Valerio Balestri in the welterweight division while Jean Kamalli and Billy Sutherland take to the cage. Kyle Paton and Jamie McCaugherty vie for the vacant superlightweight title and in the main event in the heavyweight division Simon Sackey faces Mahdi Zooashna.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 456 - Dynamite Fighting Show 27 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dynamite Fighting Show 27 part 1 from Transylvania, Romania. Starting off with a superfight in the lightweight division, Bogdan Floristean faces Ionut Popa and in the middleweight division, Dominik Horvath takes on Andrei "The Bonecrusher" Varga. Also stepping into the cage are Brazilian Rodrigo Mineiro and Romanian Florin Lambagiu.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 458 - Dynamite Fighting Show 27 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dynamite Fighting Show 27 part 2 from Transylvania, Romania. In this episode Fernando Martin from Spain and Romania's Andrei Leustean face off in a super middleweight division bout. Next up the co-main event in the heavyweight division, Hungary's Sandor Kertesz takes on Romania's Bogan Stoica. In the main event USA's Omar Moreno steps into the ring with hometown favorite Andrei Ostravanu for a rematch in a supermiddleweight fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 457 - Shamrock FC 368
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock FC 368 from St. Louis. Up first in a female bout, Jett Bouckaert and Scarlet Mayfield take to the cage. Next watch as Arthur Jackson faces Emmanuel Primer and Billy Duncan takes on Jaylon Jones in the welterweight division. In the co-main event, Max Choriev looking to head to the UFC faces Anders Murray in what's expected to be a battle of attrition and Sam Paneitz, coming off haitus, takes on Dusty Little.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 459 - Real Fight Promotion 100
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Real Fight Promotion 100 from Ukraine. In this special centenial event RFP brings its viewers an exciting night of fights. First up Stanislav Bogush and Nazar Pryshliak faceoff in the flyweight division followed by Timofiy Mytkalyk versus Ruslan Danyliuk. Also Vyacheslav Vaseichuk and Andriy Dzioba square off. In the Grand Prix finals, the two remaing fighters Roman Bandrivchak and Stanislov Bogush vye for the championship.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 454 - Up Next Fighting 14 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting 14 part 1 from the Commerce Hotel and Casino in Southern California. In the flyweight division Daniel Labastida faces Zain Palacio, Pargev Khachatrian steps into the cage with Israel Salazar and Matthew Ingram takes on Arshag Dadourian. In the main event, with the UNF welterweight title on the line Anthony Desimon looks to take the belt from Christopher London.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 460 - Up Next Fighting 14 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting 14 part 2 from the Commerce Hotel and Casino in Southern California with a night of great action. In the Rising Stars Flyweight division, Tommy Maurice and Jarred Turner face off plus Ian Miller and Adam Halton head to the ring in a bantam weight bout of boxing versus muay thai specialists. Up next, Drake Flores and Jose Hernandez face off in what's expected to be a dynamic clash. In the main event it's champion versus champion as Interim Lightweight champion Izac Enriquez takes on the returning champ Jairee Baker.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 481 - Dream Boxing 14 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dream Boxing 14 part 1 from Riga, Latvia. First up Miks Berzins takes on Aleksandrs Sidorans for a heavyweight bout. The next matchup is betweeen Mika Bigvava from Georgia and Bohdan Sobol from Latvia with 18 wins and only one loss. In the ffinal match, Aleksis Volkovics, making his pro-debut, and Igor Trosins, both Latvian, take to the ring.
