programme.desc: Missing

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Ken Shamrock’s Iron Man competition comes to a head as two contestants battle it out for the number one spot. Every strike, every takedown matters—because only one can walk away crowned the victor. But there’s no time to celebrate. It’s mission day. After a quick live-fire break, the team receives critical intel from the ISR daylight crew. The risk spikes as night falls and the mission is suddenly altered, forcing the contestants to adapt on the fly. With Red Cat providing coordination from above, the squad is redeployed under new marching orders and even higher stakes. A partially compromised team makes survival uncertain, but when the moment of truth arrives, the team leader takes decisive action—leading a direct breach on the target. One bold decision shifts the course of the mission entirely, and its success now hangs by a thread.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: It’s the finale of Country Ball season one. Through their journey, Dylan and Luca have become brothers. With Jesse’s help, they’ll show just how much they’ve grown as players. Get ready to cheer for some incredible football. You’re not going to want to miss this!

programme.desc: Sig Sauer P320 modular pistol with interchangeable grips and slides. Crimson Trace green lasers, Double Tap long range ammo, fully loaded Stag Arms AR, and Ruger American rifle family.

programme.title: Gun Talk Hunt - NRL Hunter Deep Dive - S5E23
programme.desc: KJ chats with Ben Fabre of Roaming Shot Outdoors and Kyle Lamb from Viking Tactics on NRL Hunter; pro gear setups, ranging tricks, odd positions, target acquisition, and why it's top-tier for hunters.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - SIG Cool & Concealed Carry - S5E1

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Tactical Gear & Training Tips - S5E3

Plus XS Sights straight-line Big Dot system, CrossBreed modular belly band holster, Crimson Trace Defender Series lasers, power factor explained, and Smith & Wesson M&P10 .308 rifle.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Maintenance Power & Lasers - S5E4
programme.desc: Pro tips for AR lubrication and cleaning to keep rifles running reliably. Plus LaserLyte Kryptonite red Center Mass laser, Springfield XD/XDM 9mm lineup with barrel length testing, Magnum Research 10-inch Desert Eagle in .50 AE, Ruger SR45 double-stack, XS Sights Big Dot, and CrossBreed modular belly band holster.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - AR Accessories & Optics - S5E7

Plus Trijicon’s revolutionary military-only smart optic with built-in rangefinder and ballistic calculator, Rob Latham’s should-vs-could personal defense advice, and Springfield XD/XDS carry pistol tips.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Shotguns Bullets & Training - S5E8

Plus Springfield RO Compact 1911, Mossberg Duck Commander shotguns & .22 pistol, Barnes Vortex ammo, Ruger LCRx revolver, LaserLyte AR dry-fire kit, Stag lefty AR, and Browning safe.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - SIG Sauer Ammo & More - S6E12
programme.desc: SIG Sauer launches consistent V-Crown pistol ammo in 9mm, .40, .45, .357 SIG & .380 with perfect expansion. Plus upgraded AR bolt carriers, Ruger Vaquero single action, S&W Model 66/69 revolvers, Ruger GP100 Match Champion, Remington R51 with Crimson Trace laser, and Magnum Research .22 Magnum semi-auto rifle.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - S&W M&P 22 Compact - S6E13
programme.desc: Smith & Wesson expands the M&P line with the new .22 Compact featuring ambi safety, adjustable sights, and threaded barrel for suppressors. Also: CrossBreed RAM modular mounting system, DoubleTap Equalizer two-projectile ammo, Mossberg Cruiser with Center Mass laser, white light techniques, and Browning Hell’s Canyon hunting clothing.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Vortex Ammo & More - S7E1
programme.desc: Barnes launches new Vortex hunting loads. Smith & Wesson expands M&P pistols. Condition Crimson mindset from Crimson Trace, Sig Sauer silencers, and Stag Arms 9mm AR rifle.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Ruger American Trigger - S7E2
programme.desc: Timney upgrades the Ruger American rifle. Double Tap Safari ammo. Polycase polymer-copper defensive rounds, Slip 2000 lubricants and protectants, plus the threaded Ruger American Rimfire rifle in .22LR.

programme.title: Gun Talk Nation - NRA Reform Push - S5E4
programme.desc: Randy Luth, DPMS founder & Luth-AR owner, runs for NRA board to drive reform. Discusses past scandals, new leadership, youth programs, gun education in schools, and AR barrel innovations.

programme.title: Gun Talk Nation - Custom Rifle Builds Guide - S5E5
programme.desc: Todd Bonura of Maniacal Arms breaks down custom rifle builds; purpose, caliber choices, actions, bottom metal, barrels, suppressors & trends like 7 Backcountry & short barrels.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Bank Robbery - S13E20
programme.desc: Ex-cop Mike stops an armed robber at the bank. He trains verbal commands and post-shoot conduct.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Roadside Chaos - S13E21
programme.desc: Karen tries de-escalating an armed road-rage driver. She learns to shoot from a car and remain calm.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Home Invasion Bedroom - S14E1
programme.desc: Woman surprises intruder in bedroom; trains retention draw, verbal commands.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Roadside Robbery Defense - S14E2
programme.desc: Couple aids stranded motorist, faces armed robbery; trains stealth draw to survive.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Active Shooter Response - S14E3
programme.desc: Worker hears gunfire, confronts intruder holding coworker; trains movement, positioning.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Car Intrusion Defense - S14E4
programme.desc: Wife alone in car faces armed intruder; trains escape, gun access tactics.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Hostage Carjacking Rescue - S14E5
programme.desc: Husband saves wife from armed carjackers; trains headshots, positioning with partner.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Mailman Mugging Intervention - S14E6
programme.desc: Bystander aids robbed mailman vs. knife; trains distance, verbal commands.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Road Rage Assault - S14E7
programme.desc: Woman in car faces bat-wielding aggressors; trains verbal commands, awareness.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Knife-Wielding Lunatic Attack - S14E8
programme.desc: Shopper exits restroom into deranged knife threat; trains decisive action, verbal commands.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Carjacking Family Defense - S14E9
programme.desc: Driver thwarts carjacker at gas pump; trains in-car tactics with family aboard.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Glock Laser Training - S7E3
programme.desc: Discover safe dry-fire with LaserLyte's Glock trainer barrel. Plus Ruger's LC9s, LCP Custom, CrossBreed Mini Tuck holster, 28 Nosler cartridge, thumb safety drills, and Springfield M1A PAS.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Sig P320 Modular - S7E4
programme.desc: Sig Sauer P320 modular pistol with interchangeable grips and slides. Crimson Trace green lasers, Double Tap long range ammo, fully loaded Stag Arms AR, and Ruger American rifle family.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Springfield 1911 Operators - S7E5
programme.desc: Springfield Armory debuts new MC Operator and Loaded Black Operator 1911s. Stag Arms AR accessories, LaserLyte Mighty Mouse laser, Barnes Range AR ammo, and Smith & Wesson suppressor-ready pistols.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - M&P Ported Pistols - S7E6
programme.desc: Smith & Wesson Performance Center ported M&P CORE and Shield pistols with competition optics ready slides and reduced recoil. Stag Arms Model 9L 9mm AR rifle, Crimson Trace lasers for concealed carry.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Ruger AR & Grand Power - S7E7
programme.desc: Ruger’s affordable direct impingement AR-556. Grand Power pistols from Slovakia. Nosler BT Ballistic Tip ammo, CrossBreed appendix carry holster, and Sig Sauer’s new optics lineup.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Rail Master Laser - S7E8
programme.desc: Crimson Trace Rail Master red and green lasers. Ruger BX Trigger for 10/22 rifles, Mossberg Blaze .22 rimfire rifles, STI 2011 double-stack 1911s, and Smith & Wesson green lasers.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Springfield RO Compact - S7E9
programme.desc: Springfield Armory RO Compact 1911 with bull barrel. Stag Arms Model 3T competition AR, Smith & Wesson J-frame revolvers with LaserMax, Slip 2000 Carbon Killer cleaner, and Mossberg Patriot bolt-action rifle.

programme.title: Gun Talk Nation - Pimp Hand Reality Check - S4E51
programme.desc: Ryan Gresham & Paul Markel drop truth bombs, stop making excuses, carry daily, train hard, ditch comfort zones, and why gun-free zones & mental avoidance fail us.

programme.title: Gun Talk Nation - Shot Show 2026 Secrets - S4E54
programme.desc: Ryan Gresham, KJ, & Chris Cerino share Shot Show 2026 highlights, new suppressors, Glock Gen6, Beretta & Staccato range days, and why Vegas is grueling fun.

programme.title: Gun Talk Nation - Ricochet Range Injury Nightmare - S5E1
programme.desc: Jared Gamez shares his shocking ricochet neck injury at the range despite safety protocols. Lessons on preparedness, eye pro, and getting back out shooting.

programme.title: S1E2 - Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Prepare to get schooled. Expert gearheads Kevin Byrd and Willie B have a wealth of technical knowledge and a passion to share it each week on Two Guys Garage. This duo covers virtually every aspect of vehicle repair, customization, and restoration, breaking it down along the way to show the audience how it all works. With DIY tips, demonstrations, and deep dives into the latest aftermarket innovations, chances are you’ll learn something new each time you visit Two Guys Garage.
